synthesis.overallVerdict: No â€” the classifier measures thematic co-occurrence and generic mana plumbing far better than it measures genuine deck cohesion or value. Two structural defects dominate the corpus: (1) several families generate near-complete cliques or all-to-hub fans (rampâ†’sink, lordâ†’tribe, graveyard, proliferate/counters, sac-fodderâ†’outlet, copyâ†’trigger), inflating edge counts and degree without representing distinct synergies; and (2) ~25 set-defining mechanics have no event at all, so the actual engine of focused precons is invisible. The net effect is a systematic downward bias on tightly-themed decks (20 too-low vs 9 too-high) because their identity lives in unmodeled families while their score is propped up only by generic glue. The core family taxonomy (draw/death-drain/tokens/lord/magecraft on the RIGHT decks) is sound and should not be discarded â€” the fixes are gating, directionality, and a handful of new high-coverage event families.
synthesis.scoreAccuracy: Systematic downward bias on focused decks. 20 too-low vs 9 too-high (and 67 accurate) is not symmetric noise: nearly every too-low case is a deck whose defining mechanic has no taxonomy event (Endless Punishment punisher-draw, World Shaper sac-lands/landfall, Sultai Arisen graveyard-direction, Grand Larceny theft, Timey-Wimey time-counters, Mishra artifacts-matter, Buckle Up crew, Blame Game goad-direction, Deep Clue Sea clue/draw-payoff, Most Wanted crime). The cohesion formula compounds this: weightedAvgDeg/4 and largestWebShare reward dense generic webs, so a deck with one real but unmodeled engine plus little generic glue lands in 'Pile of good-stuff' (e.g. Eldrazi Unbound 7, Painbow 14, Grand Larceny 11, Timey-Wimey 14) even when it is mechanically coherent. The too-HIGH cases are the mirror: cliquey families over-credit a deck (Enduring Enchantments 79, Coven Counters 70, Turtle Power 69, Token Triumph 67, Divine Convocation 52, Upgrades Unleashed 60) where one many-to-one trigger or generic ramp is counted as N^2 strong edges. Where errors cancel (noise inflates while real engine is missed) the band lands right 'for the wrong reasons' â€” flagged repeatedly by evaluators (Scions 48, Corrupting Influence 57, Revenant Recon).

topFalsePositivePatterns.pattern: rampâ†’sink combinatorial blowup: every mana rock/dork is edged to every X-spell or mana-using card, producing a near-complete bipartite fan that is present in essentially every Commander deck and is not deck-specific synergy. It is the single most frequently-cited false positive and dominates edge counts (e.g. 198 of 358 edges in Eldrazi Incursion, 605 family-instances in Divine Convocation, 170 in Token Triumph, 126 in Hail Caesar).

lordâ†’tribe fires without checking the lord's actual buff condition or whether the card is a lord at all: legendary-only anthems (Bastion Protector), single-type lords (Cat/Dog/Knight/Spirit lords), global combat anthems (Beastmaster Ascension, Skyhunter Strike Force), and token-making planeswalkers/creatures (Elspeth Sun's Champion, Vivien Reid, Esika) get wired to the entire creature base. Often the deck's highest-degree false hub.

Undirected 'graveyard' mega-clique: every card that touches the yard (self-mill cantrips, recursion, reanimation, graveyard-hate) is edged to every other, conflating fuelâ†”fuel, enablerâ†”payoff, and incidental text. Inflates edge count massively (702 in Sultai Arisen, 485/530 in Revenant Recon, 245 in Death Toll, 215 in Desert Bloom) while hiding the real millâ†’reanimate / millâ†’size-payoff direction.

Counters/proliferate modeled as a complete bipartite clique (every proliferator/doubler â‡„ every has-counters permanent), with no counter-TYPE check. Produces 250+ instances (Counter Intelligence), 411/470 (Corrupting Influence), 214 (Mutant Menace); links +1/+1 doublers to charge counters (Astral Cornucopia), luck counters (Chance Encounter), and one-shot placers treated as persistent multipliers (Altered Ego, Ascendant Acolyte).

sac-fodderâ†’outlet star-wires one sac outlet to every creature regardless of whether a sacrifice/aristocrats payoff exists. Generates ~30-77 phantom edges off a single non-aristocrats outlet (Sai, Illuminor Szeras, Broadside Bombardiers, Felothar, Golden Throne, Greater Gargadon, Yahenni) in decks with no real sac theme.

copyâ†’trigger does not gate on what a copier can legally copy: spell-copiers (Krark, Magus, Psionic Ritual, Feather), token-copiers (Hazel, Octomancer, Scute Swarm, populate), attacking-creature copiers (Flamerush Rider), and one-shot clones (Altered Ego, Copy Catchers) get edged to arbitrary ETB creatures/enchantments as if repeatable ETB-doublers. 76 phantom edges in Eternal Might, 62 in Revenant Recon.

'destroy' family treats shared keyword as synergy: the deck's own removal/board-wipes are edged to its own creatures, and unrelated removal spells are edged to each other (Beast Within â‡„ Heroic Intervention). No 'helps me vs hurts me' distinction; indestructible permanents are 'destroy synergies' with removal.

'attach' family edges gearâ†”gear and equipmentâ†”player-aura/curse: two Equipment that compete for the same creature, or an Equipment grouped with a player-targeting Curse, are treated as mutual synergy (206-edge clique in Scrappy Survivors, ~80 in Upgrades Unleashed). Pure string/capability collision.

topFalseNegativePatterns.pattern: Set-defining keyword mechanics have no event, so the deck's entire identity is invisible and the producer tag has no consumer. This is the largest single source of too-low scores. Affected mechanics: The Ring/tempts-you, Amass, Food, energy (producerâ†’payoff), poison/toxic/infect, crime/outlaw, convoke, crew/Vehicle+reconfigure, storm/cast-count, cascade, suspend/time-counters, manifest/morph/megamorph, coven, surveil, explore, discover, theft (cast-from-opponent), transform/DFC, embalm/eternalize.

Reaction families are produce-only with no PAYOFF/consumer side. lifegain and lifeloss exist as produced events but there is no lifegainâ†’drain/draw payoff family, no opponent-draw-punish family, no symmetric-damage/punisher family. Whole archetypes (lifegain matters, group-slug punisher, Exquisite Blood drain combos) are unmodeled.
exampleDecks: Blood Rites (LCI) â€” missed infinite combo

topFalseNegativePatterns.pattern: No evasion/keyword-tribe â†’ combat-damage-payoff family: flying/unblockable/islandwalk anthems and the on-combat-damage draw/mill/steal payoffs they enable are not linked, so the actual win condition of evasive go-wide decks is missing. Flyer anthems and unblockable enablers land in islandCards.

Trigger-DOUBLERS and many-to-one board-watchers are not recognized as multiplicative payoffs: Veyran/Harmonic Prodigy (magecraft doublers), Panharmonicon (ETB doubler), token-doublers (Divine Visitation, Anointed Procession), and constellation/'whenever an enchantment ETBs' payoffs are either flattened into a participant node or, conversely, exploded into N^2 strong edges. The model has no hub/role-bonus concept.

Skullclamp / equip-cheap-bodyâ†’deathâ†’draw engine is a recurring zero-degree island across every token/aristocrats deck â€” there is no 'attach to expendable body â†’ sac/death â†’ draw' event despite it being a premier card-advantage engine.

Commander signature abilities are flattened into generic families, so the deck's anchor card is under-connected (often deg 1-9). Attack-trigger token-copy, free-cast-on-cost, blink/cast-from-exile/top-of-library, animate-noncreature, eminence token-on-cast, counter-placement-triggers-draw all collapse to generic cast/combat/graveyard tags.

Land-recursionâ†’landfall and fetch-rampâ†’landfall are missed: basic-fetching ramp sorceries (Cultivate, Kodama's Reach, Farseek) and land-recursion (World Shaper, Titania, Ramunap Excavator, Splendid Reclamation) are flagged as zero-interaction islands because only cards tagged 'landfall' explicitly count, so the central landfall loop reads as inconsistent islands.

recommendedChanges.change: Gate rampâ†’sink: only emit an edge when the sink is a genuine repeatable mana-dump or scaling X-payoff (is-mana-sink AND (X-cost OR repeatable activated ability)), and cap the family's contribution per-deck (e.g. log-scale or per-source cap) so it cannot dominate edge count. Down-weight to near-zero for generic rockĂ—any-castable pairs.
recommendedChanges.rationale: Most-cited false positive across the corpus; structurally present in nearly every deck so it adds no discriminating signal yet inflates edge count and weightedAvgDeg, simultaneously over-crediting goodstuff piles and (as the dominant noise) masking real engines.
recommendedChanges.evidenceCount: ~60+ decks cite rampâ†’sink over-firing as a primary FP

recommendedChanges.change: Make lordâ†’tribe subtype/condition-aware: only edge a lord to creatures that actually share the granted subtype or meet its condition (legendary-only, chosen-type, color), and stop tagging global combat anthems / token-makers / planeswalkers as 'is-lord'. Represent a lord as a hub with bounded contribution rather than an all-creatures clique.
recommendedChanges.rationale: Second-most-cited FP; produces the highest-degree false hubs (Elspeth, Bastion Protector, Sliver lords' 595-edge clique) that directly inflate largestWebShare and avgDeg, and the is-lord mis-tag (Beastmaster Ascension, Skyhunter, Vivien) is a clean classifier bug.
recommendedChanges.evidenceCount: ~35+ decks; plus explicit is-lord mis-tag in ~10

recommendedChanges.change: Split 'graveyard' into directional sub-families: self-mill/discard FUEL â†’ graveyard PAYOFF (reanimation target, graveyard-size payoff, recursion outlet). Only edge fuelâ†’payoff (and payoffâ†’target), never fuelâ†”fuel. Add delve/escape/dredge and reanimate-target-quality as recognized events.
recommendedChanges.rationale: Graveyard is an undirected mega-clique generating the largest raw edge counts (702, 485, 245) while the actual millâ†’reanimate engine is invisible; this single change fixes both the biggest FP cluster and a major FN class, and graveyard decks are heavily over-represented (8+ too-low).

recommendedChanges.change: Add directional PAYOFF families for currently produce-only events: lifegainâ†’payoff (drain/draw), opponent-draw-punish, symmetric/group-slug damage payoff, and evasion-grantâ†’combat-damage-payoff. Require a real payoff endpoint; do not edge two producers to each other.
recommendedChanges.rationale: Closes the largest FN archetypes driving too-low verdicts (punisher decks, lifegain-matters, evasive go-wide) and simultaneously fixes the lifegain all-pairs FP (every life-gainer â‡„ every other).
recommendedChanges.evidenceCount: ~25+ decks across FN and FP lists

recommendedChanges.change: Add a small set of high-coverage 'shared-resource / set-keyword' event families modeled as producerâ†’payoff (NOT producerâ†”producer cliques): energy, poison/toxic/infectâ†’poison-win, +1/+1-counter payoff distinct from charge/loyalty/other counter types, convoke/affinity (tokensâ†’cost-reduction), and a generic 'tribal anthem/cost-reduction on a noncreature permanent' event. Prioritize mechanics that recur across multiple sets.
recommendedChanges.rationale: Energy and counters are already over-modeled as cliques (fix direction) while poison/convoke/tribal-anthem are pure FNs; these appear across many sets so they are not overfitting to one precon. Lower priority than the gating fixes because they require new event definitions.
recommendedChanges.evidenceCount: ~15+ decks (energy 2, poison 1 but 6 issues, counters 12, convoke 3, tribal-anthem several)

recommendedChanges.change: Gate copyâ†’trigger, sac-fodderâ†’outlet, and attach by capability/legality: copyâ†’trigger must match what the copier can legally copy (spell vs ETB vs token vs attacker) and exclude one-shot clones from 'repeatable engine'; sac-fodderâ†’outlet should require an actual death/sacrifice PAYOFF in the deck before fanning an outlet to all bodies; attach should only edge gearâ†’creature or gearâ†’attach-payoff, never gearâ†”gear or equipmentâ†”player-aura.
recommendedChanges.rationale: Three recurring clique/collision FPs with clean mechanical gates available; each inflates degree on a single hub without representing distinct synergy.

recommendedChanges.change: Introduce a commander-anchor bonus / bespoke-ability hook so the face commander's signature ability is parsed into the closest payoff family (attack-trigger token-copy, free-cast-on-cost, blink/cast-from-exile, eminence, counter-placementâ†’draw) rather than collapsing to generic cast/combat/graveyard.
recommendedChanges.rationale: ~20 decks show the commander as a near-island despite anchoring the deck; commanders are always present and high-impact, so this is high-value and not precon-specific.

recommendedChanges.change: Recognize fetch-ramp sorceries and land-recursion as landfall enablers (treat 'search a land to battlefield' and 'return/replay land' as landfall producers), so they stop appearing as zero-interaction islands in landfall decks.
recommendedChanges.rationale: Clear, contained FN affecting landfall decks and producing misleading islandCards; lower frequency than the top items.

recommendedChanges.change: Recalibrate the cohesion band/weighting to not penalize focused single-axis decks: reduce reliance on raw weightedAvgDeg/largestWebShare (which reward cliquey breadth) and add credit for a deck with a dense, directional engine even if it is one family. Consider a soft-wincon/engine bonus separate from comboBonus.
recommendedChanges.rationale: Addresses the residual systematic too-low bias after the structural fixes above; lower priority because most band errors stem from the family bugs and will partly self-correct once cliques are gated and missing families added.
recommendedChanges.evidenceCount: 20 too-low verdicts; multiple 'right band for wrong reasons' notes

doNotChange: The core reaction-event families on the RIGHT decks are accurate and load-bearing: deathâ†’drain for aristocrats (Vampiric Bloodline, Squirreled Away, Grave Danger, Witherbloom), magecraft/spellslinger (Jeskai Striker, Prismari Artistry, Scions), and tokens/go-wide payoff for token decks all correctly identify the spine â€” keep them.

hasCombo=false / loops=0 on genuine fair precons is correct and should not be loosened broadly (Vampiric Bloodline, Draconic Dissent, Token Triumph, Upgrades Unleashed, Mishra all correctly flagged comboless). Only add detection for the specific real combos that were missed (Exquisite Blood drain loop, Hellkite Charger + Savage Ventmaw) via targeted event pairs, not by relaxing the gate.

The untapâ†’tap-ability combo gate being conservative is mostly right â€” but note the one over-fire (Explorers of the Deep flagging Sol Ring + Kiora's Follower as combo-critical s4 set hasCombo=true on a fair deck); keep the gate strict and add a payoff/loop check rather than widening it.

islandCards detection of genuinely interchangeable removal/interaction (Path, Swords, Murder, counterspells, board wipes) is accurate and useful â€” do not start manufacturing edges for these; the island problem is specifically unmodeled ENGINE pieces, not over-isolation of removal.

The 67 'accurate' verdicts and the low scores on genuine goodstuff piles (20 Ways to Win at 19, Painbow at 14, Eldrazi Unbound at 7) are correct outcomes â€” avoid changes that would uniformly inflate scores; the goal is to fix focused-deck under-scoring and clique over-counting, not to raise all bands.

Treasure, etbâ†’blink (strong), and the typed vs generic lord strength distinction are reasonable signals where they fire correctly (e.g. etbâ†’blink on Restoration Angel, Conjurer's Closet) â€” keep these; only add the gating described above.

rawEvals.name: The Hosts of Mordor (The Lord of the Rings Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Grixis (UBR) Sauron "Amass Orcs + The Ring tempts you" spellslinger/aristocrats-adjacent goodstuff precon. It plays a token-go-wide Army (Amass) shell off Sauron, Lord of the NazgĂ»l, Summons of Saruman, Mouth of Sauron and Treason of Isengard; a spellcast/magecraft sub-theme (Lord of the NazgĂ»l makes Wraiths on each instant/sorcery, Guttersnipe, Fiery Inscription, Saruman); a self-mill + reanimation package (Forbidden Alchemy, Faithless Looting, Mouth of Sauron, Too Greedily Too Deep feeding Reanimate / Living Death / Extract from Darkness for fatties like Inferno Titan, Knollspine Dragon, Troll of Khazad-dum, Balrog); and "The Ring tempts you" as the connective payoff mechanic (Sauron, Fiery Inscription, In the Darkness Bind Them, Voracious Fell Beast, plus attack/combat triggers). It wins by grinding value, going wide with Orc Armies, and turning ramp into big mana sinks / extra combats (Scourge of the Throne, Cavern-Hoard Dragon).
fp: The 'graveyard' family is wildly over-connected: every self-mill cantrip is edged to every other (Consider â‡„ Deep Analysis â‡„ Fact or Fiction â‡„ Forbidden Alchemy â‡„ Faithless Looting). Two cards merely putting cards in the same yard is not a synergy with each other â€” only with a payoff. These all-pairs edges (~99 instances) massively inflate cohesion.

Sauron â‡„ Consider / Fact or Fiction / Deep Analysis etc. tagged 'graveyard' â€” Sauron does not care that an instant filled the graveyard; his amass/Ring text isn't graveyard-fed. This is a generic 'card touched the yard' co-occurrence, not a real line.

rampâ†’sink edges treat every mana rock as synergizing with every X-spell/mana-sink body (Sol Ring/Mind Stone/Arcane Signet â‡„ Shelob/Orcish Siegemaster/Rampaging War Mammoth). Generic ramp is in every deck; pairing all 8 rocks with all 6 sinks (~63 instances) is filler, not deck-defining synergy.

magecraft family fires Fiery Inscription/Lord of the Nazgul/Guttersnipe â‡„ EVERY instant/sorcery including pure removal/wraths (Languish, Decree of Pain, Blasphemous Act, Feed the Swarm). The payoff is real but pairing it with literally every noncreature spell over-counts the engine's true density.

Revenge of Ravens / Shiny Impetus tagged 'combatâ†’payoff' with your own attackers (Corsairs, Cavern-Hoard) â€” Revenge of Ravens punishes attacks AGAINST you and Shiny Impetus is a goad/treasure aura; these are not 'when YOUR creature attacks' payoffs for your board, so several combat edges are mis-typed.
fn: THE RING / 'tempts you' mechanic â€” the deck's actual headline theme â€” has no family. Sauron, Fiery Inscription, In the Darkness Bind Them, Voracious Fell Beast and the Ring-bearer attack triggers form a real synergy cluster the taxonomy can only tag as a stray 'theRing' produce with no consuming event, so it generates zero edges.

AMASS / Army-token go-wide is not modeled as a lord/tribe or token-payoff engine. Sauron, Lord of the Nazgul, Summons of Saruman, Mouth of Sauron, Treason of Isengard and Moria Scavenger all grow the same Orc Army â€” a genuine repeatable token engine â€” but produce only generic 'tokens' with no go-wide payoff event, so this whole backbone is invisible.

Orcish Siegemaster is flagged 'is-lord'/'is-typed-lord' but gets NO lordâ†’tribe edges to the Orc/Army producers it actually buffs â€” the lord family failed to connect to the deck's dominant creature type.

Reanimation is only half-captured: the self-millâ†’reanimate line (Forbidden Alchemy/Faithless Looting â†’ Reanimate/Living Death/Extract from Darkness â†’ fat creatures) should target the big payoffs (Inferno Titan, Knollspine Dragon, Troll of Khazad-dum), but those reanimation TARGETS are islands with deg 0, so the engine's payoff end is missing.

Sacrifice/aristocrats micro-theme (Voracious Fell Beast, Merciless Executioner, Siege-Gang Commander producing 'sacrifice'/fodder + Living Death/Decree mass-sac) is not connected as a sac-fodderâ†’outlet family; Merciless Executioner sits as an island despite being a sac engine piece.
issues: No 'theRing' / 'tempts you' interaction family at all â€” a LotR-set-defining mechanic produces a capability/produce tag with no consumer, so it can never form edges. This is the single biggest taxonomy gap for this deck.

No Amass/Army go-wide payoff event. Token producers all emit a flat 'tokens' produce, but there is no 'tokensâ†’go-wide-payoff' or shared-token-growth family, so a real repeatable engine (5+ cards growing one Army) scores nothing.

lordâ†’tribe family did not fire even when a card is tagged is-typed-lord (Orcish Siegemaster) and the board is full of matching tokens â€” either tribe inference off token types is missing, or token creatures aren't typed for lord matching.

Hub families (graveyard, magecraft, rampâ†’sink) use all-pairs / all-to-hub edge generation, which inflates edge count and degree on goodstuff piles and makes cohesion sensitive to how many cantrips/rocks are present rather than to genuine combo density. Consider gating 'graveyard' co-occurrence edges to require a real graveyard payoff on at least one endpoint.

Reanimation targets (large creatures with no abilities) become islands because they only have 'is-body'; the model doesn't link reanimation spells to the high-value bodies they bring back, undercounting a real engine and inflating the island list (Troll of Khazad-dum, Knollspine Dragon, Inferno Titan).
combatâ†’payoff family conflates defensive/goad punisher enchantments (Revenge of Ravens, Shiny Impetus) with your-own-attacker payoffs, mis-typing edges.

rawEvals.name: Endless Punishment (Duskmourn Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Rakdos "group slug" / punisher-pinger deck around Valgavoth, Harrower of Souls. It wins by passively draining EVERY opponent's life through symmetric punishers (Spiteful Visions, Fate Unraveler, Kederekt Parasite punish draws; Mogis, Kaervek, Theater of Horrors punish non-action; Vial Smasher pings on casts) backed by a secondary aristocrats drain shell (Blood Artist / Falkenrath Noble / Bastion of Remembrance + sac and board wipes) and a damage-redirection package (Brash Taunter + Mask of Griselbrand + Basilisk Collar + Blasphemous Act). Valgavoth turns all that opponent life-loss into card draw and counters. It is a death-by-a-thousand-cuts / drain deck, not a combo deck.
fp: Spiteful Visions â‡„ Mind Stone / Solemn Simulacrum / Blood Pact / Sign in Blood / Combustible Gearhulk / Morbid Opportunist / Star Athlete â€” flagged as 'draw' synergies, but Spiteful Visions' payoff triggers off opponents drawing and your own card-draw spells are unrelated to it; these are coincidental shared-event edges, not real synergy
Spiteful Visions â‡„ Valgavoth (draw) â€” miscategorized; their actual relationship is the symmetric-damage/lifeloss punisher axis, not a draw synergy

rampâ†’sink: 31 edges linking every mana rock (Arcane Signet, Sol Ring, Fellwar Stone, etc.) to Florian / Gray Merchant / SĂ©ance Board / Mask of Griselbrand â€” this is the same generic 'mana exists, sink exists' pattern present in nearly every EDH deck and represents almost none of this deck's real identity; it dominates the edge count misleadingly

Brash Taunter as a 20-degree hub linking to every damage source (Blasphemous Act, Mayhem Devil, Tectonic Giant, etc.) â€” Brash Taunter is a damage-redirect/ping piece, but treating every incidental damage source as a 'synergy' edge overstates a coincidental damage-event overlap

Fate Unraveler â‡„ Stormfist Crusader / Kederekt Parasite â‡„ Stormfist Crusader (draw) â€” the model sees a draw link, but the real (and correct) synergy is the punisher reading: Stormfist makes opponents draw, which the punishers then convert to damage; labeling it 'draw' inverts who benefits
fn: The core 'punisher / symmetric draw-punish' family is entirely absent from the taxonomy: Fate Unraveler, Kederekt Parasite, Spiteful Visions all do 'whenever an OPPONENT draws, they lose life' â€” there is no event for opponent-draw-punish, so the deck's defining engine is invisible

'Wheel/forced-draw enabler â†’ punisher' line: Stormfist Crusader and Spiteful Visions force/encourage opponent draws which feed Fate Unraveler / Kederekt Parasite â€” this is a real proactive enablerâ†’payoff combo the model never connects

Symmetric group-slug damage payoffs (Mogis, God of Slaughter's upkeep trigger, Kaervek the Merciless, Theater of Horrors, Vial Smasher) feeding Valgavoth's lifeloss-consume are not unified â€” the taxonomy has no 'passive damage-to-all-opponents' family, so Mogis/Kaervek/Theater appear as islands or weak one-offs

Deathtouch-ping enabler missing: Basilisk Collar / Mask of Griselbrand granting deathtouch + lifelink to Brash Taunter (and pingers) is a real equipment-enabler line, but Basilisk Collar is listed as a degree-0 ISLAND
Lightning Greaves haste/shroud enablement of key creatures (Valgavoth, Brash Taunter) is treated as an island â€” the 'protect/haste-enabler' family is absent
issues: No 'opponent-draws â†’ lifeloss/damage' (symbiotic punisher) event exists; this is the single biggest gap and it makes the deck's namesake engine invisible, driving the score artificially low
No 'passive symmetric damage to all opponents' family (Mogis, Kaervek, Theater of Horrors, group-slug) â€” these key payoffs get no meaningful edges

rampâ†’sink family is massively over-weighted (31 of 108 edges) and is near-universal boilerplate; it inflates edge count while contributing nothing to differentiating cohesion, and likely drags the normalized score down via low weightedAvgDeg
Generic 'draw' family conflates 'I draw' with 'opponent draws is punished' â€” Spiteful Visions becomes a false 15-degree hub, double-counting the deck's identity in the wrong direction
Equipment/aura enablement (Basilisk Collar deathtouch, Lightning Greaves protection) not modeled, producing false islands for cards that clearly enable the redirect/ping package
Cohesion banding labels a thematically focused drain deck as 'Pile of good-stuff' purely because its payoffs are passive/symmetric rather than active enablerâ†’outlet chains the taxonomy recognizes

rawEvals.name: Necron Dynasties (Warhammer 40,000 Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Mono-black artifact-creature tribal reanimator/aristocrats midrange. Nearly every creature is a Necron (an artifact creature), so the deck recurs and rebuilds a wide board of bodies (the Necron "Reanimation Protocols" resilience theme): graveyard recursion via Out of the Tombs, Technomancer, Royal Warden, Ghost Ark, Triarch Praetorian, Canoptek Tomb Sentinel, plus mass reanimation in Dread Return, Living Death, and Beacon of Unrest. Sac outlets (Illuminor Szeras, Chronomancer) convert recurring bodies into mana/cards. It closes via go-wide artifact-creature payoffs â€” Their Number Is Legion (token swarm + artifact-count mana sink), Skorpekh Lord (Necron lord/anthem) and combat â€” backed by heavy artifact-rock ramp feeding the mana sinks.
fp: Sol Ring / Arcane Signet â‡„ Convergence of Dominion (cost-reductionâ†’ability): a generic mana rock is not a meaningful cost-reduction enabler for an artifact-cost-reducer â€” this is filler connectivity, not a synergy.

Illuminor Szeras â‡„ basically every creature (sac-fodderâ†’outlet, ~30 edges): treating literally every body as a distinct sac-synergy massively double-counts a single outlet; most of these are not deliberate sac lines, just 'a creature exists'.

Their Number Is Legion â‡„ every artifact creature (tribal-countâ†’payoff, ~30 edges): the payoff cares about total artifacts, so flagging each creature individually creates redundant edges that overstate intentional synergy density.
Resurrection Orb â‡„ Cranial Plating (attach): both are equipment-ish artifacts but they do not interact with each other; this attach edge is spurious.

Necron Deathmark / Their Name Is Death / Go for the Throat / Unstable Obelisk â‡„ Necron Monolith (destroy): these are removal pieces, and pairing them as a 'destroy' synergy with your own Monolith is not a real intended interaction.
fn: Artifact-matters payoffs: Cranial Plating (P/T scales with artifact count) and Caged Sun naming a type are not connected to the all-artifact-creature board â€” there is no 'artifact-countâ†’payoff' family analogous to the tribal one.
Equipment package: Cranial Plating / Mask of Memory equip-and-swing on recurring bodies is treated only as weak attach/combat edges, missing the equipment-on-evasive-attacker draw/voltron line.

The Necron 'reanimation protocols' resilience identity â€” bodies that repeatedly return (Ghost Ark, Royal Warden, Triarch Praetorian end-step recursion) forming a grindy value loop â€” is flattened into generic 'graveyard' edges with no recursion-engine recognition.
Mill-into-reanimate self-synergy: Necron Deathmark / The War in Heaven filling the yard to then be reanimated is not captured as a self-millâ†’reanimator engine.
issues: No 'artifact-countâ†’payoff' family despite this being a near-mono-artifact deck; artifact-matters payoffs (Cranial Plating, Caged Sun) are stranded.

Hub-and-spoke over-counting: a single sac outlet or single typecount payoff generates one edge per creature, inflating edge count (298 edges) and avgDeg while representing few real distinct synergies â€” weighting should collapse one-to-many fodder/payoff fans.
cost-reductionâ†’ability family fires on generic mana rocks, producing meaningless edges (any ramp â‡„ any cost-reducer).

Graveyard family is a catch-all bucket (141 edges) that conflates self-mill, recursion, reanimation, and 'has a graveyard ability' â€” it cannot distinguish a true recursion engine from incidental graveyard text.

Cohesion 47 ('Loosely connected') under-rates a deck that is mechanically extremely on-theme (94% interactive, single web, only 4 islands); the score likely penalizes the redundant low-strength edges rather than rewarding tight thematic focus.

rawEvals.name: Heads I Win, Tails You Lose (Secret Lair Commander 2021 Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Coin-flip / dice "chaos" tribal. This is the classic Zndrsplt + Okaun coin-flip precon (the listed commander Niv-Mizzet, Parun is almost certainly a metadata error â€” the real faces are Zndrsplt/Okaun). It wins by generating tons of repeated coin flips with multipliers (Krark's Thumb, Krark the Thumbless, Okaun/Zndrsplt double-on-heads, Mirror March, Stitch in Time extra turns) feeding payoffs: Okaun grows huge and connects, Yusri burns/draws, Chance Encounter wins at 10 luck counters, and Krark copies the whole spellbook on heads. Secondary plan is Izzet spellslinger value (cantrips + Niv-Mizzet/Locust God draw-burn) plus an Embercleave/voltron beatdown finish.
fp: Mogg Assassin â‡„ Crooked Scales (diceCoin) â€” both happen to flip coins but there is no interaction; flipping for one does nothing for the other
Boompile â‡„ Impulsive Maneuvers (diceCoin) â€” symmetric co-membership in the flip cluster, not a real synergy edge
Planar Chaos â‡„ Goblin Archaeologist (diceCoin) â€” independent random-outcome cards, no shared payoff

Spark Double â‡„ Chance Encounter (counter-multiplier, strength 3) â€” Spark Double copies a creature; it does not multiply Chance Encounter's luck counters (an enchantment), so this strong edge is bogus
Spark Double â‡„ Karplusan Minotaur (counter-multiplier, s3) â€” Karplusan Minotaur uses coin-flip damage, not +1/+1 counters; the counter-multiplier read is a misfire

Niv-Mizzet â‡„ Bloodsworn Steward (lordâ†’tribe) and the whole Bloodsworn Steward lordâ†’tribe cluster â€” Bloodsworn Steward only doubles a Dragon's power, it is not a tribal lord for this deck's creatures
Krark, the Thumbless â‡„ Embercleave (copyâ†’trigger) â€” Krark copies instants/sorceries, not equipment-cast triggers; spurious
fn: Krark's Thumb as a coin-flip MULTIPLIER (flip two, ignore one) â€” the single most important card; treated as just another diceCoin node with no special multiplier/payoff event
Okaun + Zndrsplt core engine: on heads you flip AGAIN and Okaun doubles + gains double strike â€” the recursive 'flip until you lose' loop and the win-on-heads payoff have no event in the taxonomy
Chance Encounter win condition (10 luck counters from winning flips = win the game) â€” a true alternate win-con that is left as an island/near-island with no flipâ†’counter payoff edge
Krark, the Thumbless copy-on-heads as a flip PAYOFF, not just magecraft â€” copying every instant/sorcery on a successful flip is the deck's real engine and is undercounted
Stitch in Time / Seize the Day extra-turn payoff from flips â€” extra-turns as a flip reward has no representation
Mirror March's 'flip for each creature, copy on heads' go-wide engine is only partially captured (copyâ†’trigger) and not tied to the flip-payoff family
issues: diceCoin family is a flat co-membership relation: it makes any two flip cards a synergy edge, massively inflating edge count (144 instances) without distinguishing multiplier â†’ flipper â†’ payoff roles

No flip/dice PAYOFF or WIN-CONDITION event: Chance Encounter, Okaun heads-doubling, and 'flip until you lose' loops are invisible, so the deck's actual kill lines are not modeled (hasCombo=false despite a near-deterministic Krark's Thumb + flip-doubler engine)
No flip-MULTIPLIER capability (Krark's Thumb, Okaun/Zndrsplt extra-flip) â€” the cards that make the whole strategy work are scored identically to vanilla flip cards

counter-multiplier family misfires across counter TYPES: it links a +1/+1-counter doubler (Spark Double) to luck counters (Chance Encounter) and coin-flip damage (Karplusan Minotaur), producing false strength-3 edges
lordâ†’tribe over-fires on Bloodsworn Steward (a single-Dragon power-doubler), tagging it as a lord over many non-relevant creatures
Likely commander metadata bug: deck attributed to Niv-Mizzet, Parun rather than the Zndrsplt/Okaun coin-flip pair, which would also skew which hub the model treats as central

rawEvals.name: World Shaper (Edge of Eternities Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Jund (BRG) landfall + lands-matter graveyard recursion midrange. Szarel, Genesis Shepherd sacrifices a land each turn to mill and make a Sand token, which feeds two interlocking engines: (1) landfall payoffs that go wide/big (Rampaging Baloths, Omnath Locus of Rage, Horizon Explorer, Tireless Tracker, Moraug) and (2) land/permanent recursion from the yard (Splendid Reclamation, Titania, Aftermath Analyst, Soul of Windgrace, Centaur Vinecrasher, Multani). It wins by recurring lands repeatedly to retrigger landfall for tokens + damage, often closing with Omnath/Moraug combat or Worldsoul's Rage. Classic value-grind landfall, not a combo deck.
fp: Hearthhull â‡„ Baloth Prime / Scouring Swarm / Titania (deathâ†’drain): the deathâ†’drain family is largely spurious here â€” this deck has almost no sacrifice-for-drain aristocrats payoff; Hearthhull's landfall/draw role is being mislabeled as a drain engine off token bodies that die incidentally

Infernal Grasp / Beast Within / Putrefy / Rakdos Charm / Windgrace's Judgment / Binding the Old Gods â‡„ Soul of Windgrace (destroy): these are generic removal spells paired to Soul only because Soul happens to consume a 'destroy' event; that is not a real synergy, just spot removal coexisting with a card that can recur lands

Arcane Signet / Sol Ring â‡„ Gaze of Granite / Worldsoul's Rage / Formless Genesis (rampâ†’sink): treating colorless rocks as dedicated fuel for X-spells is a generic ramp-meets-X-spell coincidence, not a deck-specific engine

Eumidian Wastewaker copyâ†’trigger edges to Springbloom Druid / Sprouting Goblin (s2): these are flagged as copy-payoff ETB engines but are low-impact one-shot land-ETB copies, overweighted relative to the real landfall loop
fn: The defining engine: Szarel's repeatable 'sacrifice a land each upkeep -> mill + create Sand token' is a SELF-FUELED recurring sac-land/landfall enabler. The taxonomy has no event for self-sacrificing lands, so Szarel is nearly an island (deg 5) despite being the linchpin that powers every landfall and graveyard payoff

Sac-lands -> Splendid Reclamation / Titania / Aftermath Analyst mass-return loop: deliberately filling the yard with LANDS to return them all at once for a massive landfall burst is the deck's payoff line, but 'return all lands -> N landfall triggers' is not modeled as a burst-landfall combo (no loop/combo-critical detected)

Lands-as-graveyard-fuel distinction: the graveyard family lumps land-recursion (this deck) with creature-reanimation, missing that Centaur Vinecrasher / Multani / Uurg scale specifically off LANDS in the yard, a distinct 'graveyard-lands-matter' subfamily

Landfall density payoff: Moraug's extra-combat-per-landfall + Szarel/fetch-lands creating multiple landfalls per turn is a near-combo damage engine that the combat-enabler family only weakly touches (2 instances)
issues: No event/capability for self-sacrificing lands or 'sac-land-each-turn' engines, so the commander Szarel â€” the deck's defining card â€” is almost an island and the central enabler is invisible to cohesion
graveyard family is a catch-all: it conflates land-recursion / lands-matter-in-yard with creature reanimation, inflating the 67 count while hiding the actual mechanical theme (lands in graveyard)
deathâ†’drain is over-applied off any token-producer + Hearthhull, manufacturing an aristocrats subtheme this deck does not run
destroy family pairs every removal spell to a single 'destroy'-consuming card (Soul of Windgrace), generating ~9 false edges from generic interaction
rampâ†’sink fires generically for colorless rocks + any X-spell, not deck-specific

Cohesion 18 / band 'Pile of good-stuff' badly underrates a tightly-themed precon: pctInteractive 71 and a 71% largest-web share indicate one dominant synergy web, yet the headline score reads as unsynergistic â€” the weightedAvgDeg/strength model is penalizing a deck whose synergies are real but mostly strength-1 landfall/graveyard edges plus an enabler (Szarel) it cannot see

rawEvals.name: Veloci-Ramp-Tor (The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Naya (RGW) Dinosaur tribal ramp/midrange. The deck ramps hard into big dinosaurs, abuses lord effects (Regisaur Alpha, Thundering Spineback), and wins via combat with overrun-style payoffs (Return of the Wildspeaker, Akroma's Will, Xenagos). Two real engine sub-themes: (1) the "enrage / damage-to-my-own-creatures" punisher package â€” Wrathful Raptors, Ripjaw Raptor, Ranging Raptors, Bellowing Aegisaur, Apex Altisaur, Marauding Raptor as the deliberate self-damager, plus Chandra's Ignition / Fiery Confluence / Savage Stomp as board-wide ping enablers; and (2) Pantlaza's discover-on-power-4+-ETB engine fueling free cheats, supported by big-creature value (Etali, Zacama, Verdant Sun's Avatar lifegain).
fp: Scion of Calamity â‡„ many dinos tagged copyâ†’trigger (12 edges, e.g. Bronzebeak Foragers, Topiary Stomper, Verdant Sun's Avatar) â€” Scion of Calamity does NOT copy creatures or their ETBs; it makes a token copy of a NONLAND PERMANENT it damages in combat only situationally. Treating it as a blink/copy-ETB engine across the whole board is a misread.
Earthshaker Dreadmaw â‡„ Scion of Calamity copyâ†’trigger â€” Earthshaker Dreadmaw is a vanilla-ish trample beater; there is no copy interaction here.

rampâ†’sink edges from Sol Ring/Arcane Signet to small bodies like Bronzebeak Foragers and Dinosaur Egg â€” these are not meaningful mana sinks; generic ramp-to-anything-castable inflates the count without representing real synergy.
Akroma's Will â‡„ Thrashing Brontodon / Fiery Confluence under 'destroy' â€” these share a destroy event but do not synergize with each other; co-membership in a family is being read as an edge.
fn: DISCOVER mechanic â€” Pantlaza, Sun-Favored discovers each time a power-4+ creature enters; this is the commander's core engine connecting to nearly every dinosaur in the deck, and it is entirely absent from the taxonomy (no etb-power / discover event).

ENRAGE as a named mechanic â€” Ripjaw Raptor and Ranging Raptors trigger on being dealt damage; the 'damage' family approximates the payoff side but there is no explicit enrageâ†’self-damage-source recognition, so Marauding Raptor's role as an intentional enrage enabler is undercounted.

Landfall ramp payoff â€” Ranging Raptors, Topiary Stomper, Wayward Swordtooth produce 'landfall' but the basic-fetching ramp (Cultivate, Farseek, Rampant Growth, Migration Path, Thunderherd Migration) has no landfall-trigger event, leaving all five ramp spells as islands despite being real enablers.
Big-creature 'cast for free' payoffs â€” Etali (cast off top) and Pantlaza's discover both cheat spells; no cast-cheat synergy family links these to the high-CMC bomb density.
issues: No 'discover' or 'ETB-power-threshold' event exists, so the commander's signature engine is invisible â€” a structural gap for any LCI/discover deck.
copyâ†’trigger family is too loose: it fired 12 times off Scion of Calamity, which is not a clone/blink/copy-ETB card, creating a phantom sub-engine.
rampâ†’sink generates an edge to every castable permanent rather than true mana sinks, inflating edge count and avgDeg without representing synergy.
Landfall-producing permanents have no matching landfall-consumer event for basic-land-fetch ramp, stranding 5 ramp spells as islands and undercounting a real subtheme.
'damage' family conflates board-ping enablers with enrage payoffs but does not distinguish the intentional self-damage line (Marauding Raptor) from incidental shared damage tags.

rawEvals.name: Food and Fellowship (The Lord of the Rings Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Abzan (WBG) Food/lifegain "go-tall and go-wide" tokens deck with a Hobbits-matter shell and an aristocrats-drain finish. It makes Food and creature tokens (Sam, Rosie, Butterbur, Merry, Treebeard, Prosperous Innkeeper, Tireless Provisioner, Gilded Goose, Generous Ent, Banquet/Rapacious Guest), gains incidental life off Food/tokens, then converts that into damage: Mirkwood Bats drains the table whenever tokens/creatures die or leave, Sanguine Bond turns lifegain into life loss, and Eagles of the North / Pippin / Field-Tested Frying Pan provide an anthem/overrun go-wide kill. Frodo himself rewards combat damage with The Ring / card draw. Card advantage engines (Of Herbs and Stewed Rabbit, Dawn of Hope, Well of Lost Dreams, Trading Post, Savvy Hunter) keep the gas flowing. It is a casual battlecruiser midrange deck with no true infinite combo.
fp: Sam, Loyal Attendant â‡„ Sol Ring / Arcane Signet / Chromatic Lantern / Commander's Sphere / Pristine Talisman (cost-reductionâ†’ability) â€” Sam reduces the cost of HOBBIT/legendary creature spells (or his own ability), not mana-rock activated abilities; pairing him with generic mana rocks as cost-reduction is spurious
Sam, Loyal Attendant â‡„ Hithlain Rope / Birds of Paradise (cost-reductionâ†’ability) â€” same error; Sam does not meaningfully reduce dork/rock activation costs

Banquet Guests â‡„ Go for the Throat / Mortify / Toxic Deluge-adjacent wipes / Dusk//Dawn / Fell the Mighty / Fumigate (destroy) â€” flagging the deck's own targeted removal and wraths as 'synergy' edges with a creature is a false positive; these are answers, not combo pieces

sac-fodderâ†’outlet over-pairing â€” e.g. Birds of Paradise / Essence Warden / Mentor of the Meek â‡„ Trading Post: treating every small body as 'fodder' for any sac outlet creates dozens of edges that are not intentional sacrifice synergies

lifegain mega-cluster â€” pairing every lifegain creature (Treebeard, Prize Pig, Farmer Cotton, Orchard Strider, etc.) with every other lifegain source as a 'synergy' edge inflates the count; most are parallel incidental lifegain, not interactive pairs
fn: Food matters â€” the deck's titular mechanic has no family. Field-Tested Frying Pan, Prize Pig, Gilded Goose, Lobelia, Tireless/Prosperous Innkeeper, Savvy Hunter, Feasting Hobbit all create or eat Food tokens; the Food economy (artifact-token make â†’ sacrifice for value/life) is the real engine and is only captured loosely as 'tokens'/'lifegain'

The Ring / Ring-bearer mechanic â€” Frodo produces and consumes 'theRing' (an event in his p/c list) but no family models the Ring-bearer tempt/draw escalation; Frodo's primary engine is invisible to the taxonomy

lifegainâ†’drain payoff as a directed combo line â€” Sanguine Bond converting lifegain into life loss alongside Mirkwood Bats is the closest thing to a kill engine, but it is scored only as generic 'lifegain'/'deathâ†’drain' weak edges rather than recognized as the deck's actual win condition

+1/+1 counters subtheme â€” Treebeard, Rosie Cotton, Rapacious Guest, Banquet Guests, Of Herbs and Stewed Rabbit, Call for Unity all carry has-counters, but there is no counters-matter family tying these together
issues: No 'Food' / artifact-token family despite Food being a first-class, named subtheme; collapsing it into generic 'tokens' loses the makeâ†’sacrificeâ†’lifegain loop
No Ring-bearer / theRing payoff family even though the engine emits/consumes a 'theRing' event â€” the commander's core mechanic is untracked
'destroy' family generates false edges between a creature and the deck's own removal/wraths; removal spells should not form synergy edges with arbitrary creatures

cost-reductionâ†’ability is too loose: it pairs a typed-spell cost reducer (Sam reduces creature spells) with mana-rock activated abilities, conflating spell-cost reduction with ability-activation cost reduction
lifegain and sac-fodderâ†’outlet are over-weighted via all-pairs counting (131 and 76 instances), inflating avgDeg and cohesion from incidental overlaps rather than intentional engines
No counters-matter family to capture the proliferate/counter subtheme present on many cards

rawEvals.name: Mutant Menace (Fallout Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Sultai (+1/+1) counters-matters midrange built around proliferate. The Wise Mothman gives every creature you cast a +1/+1 counter and rewards you for proliferating; the deck stacks counters via counter-doublers (Branching Evolution, Corpsejack Menace, Hardened Scales, Lily Bowen) and floods proliferate effects (Radstorm, Atomize, Inexorable Tide, Contagion Clasp, Vexing Radgull, Recon Craft Theta, Agent Frank Horrigan) to grow a wide board and win via combat with payoffs like Inspiring Call, Marcus, and Piper. Secondary rad-counter/mill flavor theme (Mothman, Hancock, Fraying Sanity) but it is not a real wincon.
fp: Agent Frank Horrigan â‡„ Atomize / Casualties of War / Putrefy flagged as 'destroy' synergy â€” these are independent removal spells, not a synergy; sharing a 'produces destroy' tag is not an interaction

copyâ†’trigger edges like Radstorm â‡„ Nightkin Ambusher and Watchful Radstag â‡„ Nightkin Ambusher are dubious â€” Nightkin Ambusher has no relevant repeatable ETB/copy payoff here; this looks like an over-eager copy family match

Fraying Sanity â‡„ Nuka-Nuke Launcher and Fraying Sanity â‡„ Power Fist tagged 'attach' â€” Fraying Sanity is an Aura on an opponent for mill, Equipment attaches to your creatures; these are unrelated 'attach' string collisions, not a real synergy

rampâ†’sink edges from Talismans/Sol Ring/Arcane Signet to Contaminated Drink â€” Contaminated Drink is a one-shot instant, not a recurring mana sink; treating generic rampâ†’any-X-cost-spell as synergy inflates the count

Jason Bright â‡„ Tato Farmer / Winding Constrictor / Nightkin Ambusher as 'sac-fodderâ†’outlet' is technically true but trivially weak; flagging every creature as fodder for one sac outlet overstates cohesion
fn: No 'radiation'/rad-counter mechanic event in the taxonomy â€” The Wise Mothman, Hancock, Feral Ghoul, Glowing One etc. care about giving opponents/yourself rad counters and milling, which is the set's signature mechanic; the classifier folds it into generic 'counters' and misses the radâ†’millâ†’graveyard-payoff line entirely
Fraying Sanity / Raul (mill) â†’ Mothman & rad theme is captured only as a single weak 'millâ†’graveyard-payoff' edge; the actual self-mill-as-clock and rad-mill plan is essentially invisible
Mutate/transform flavor is absent but minor

The combat-damage-as-wincon dimension (large counter-pumped board + Power Fist/Nuka-Nuke trample/menace enablers) is only lightly represented via 'combat-enabler'; the go-wide+countersâ†’lethal-attack payoff loop is underweighted relative to its real importance
issues: Proliferate family is modeled as a near-complete bipartite/clique graph (any proliferator â‡„ any has-counters card), producing 214 instances and dominating avgDeg=15.44; this structurally inflates cohesion for any counters deck regardless of payoff quality
No dedicated event for the Fallout 'radiation' / rad-counter mechanic â€” a whole set-defining keyword has no taxonomy node, causing false negatives on the rad/mill subtheme

'destroy' and 'attach' families fire on shared produced-tags / string matches rather than verified targeted interactions, generating spurious edges (removal-as-synergy, Aura/Equipment attach collisions)
rampâ†’sink treats one-shot spells (Contaminated Drink) as sinks identically to repeatable sinks (Mothman, Strength Bobblehead), with no distinction in strength

Islands list is slightly misleading: Farseek/Cultivate/Harmonize are correctly low-synergy, but Biomass Mutation (a counters/anthem payoff) and Nuclear Fallout (a board wipe interacting with the counter board) arguably should have at least weak edges

rawEvals.name: Riders of Rohan (The Lord of the Rings Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Boros (R/W) go-wide tokens combat-aggro precon. Ă‰owyn floods the board with Human/Soldier/Knight tokens (Forth Eorlingas!, Riders of Rohan, Oath of Eorl, Increasing Devotion, Faramir, Prince Imrahil, Call for Aid), buffs the team with "each attacking creature" payoffs and anthems (Erkenbrand, Beregond, Shared Animosity, Marshal's Anthem) plus the Bastion Protector legends-matter angle, and alpha-strikes. A strong secondary engine is the monarch package (Crown of Gondor, Palace Jailer, Champions of Minas Tirith, Faramir, Court of Ire, Fealty to the Realm, Aragorn) for repeatable card draw and a draw-go aggro plan. Extra-combat effects (Combat Celebrant, Village Bell-Ringer, Gimli) and Flamerush Rider copies amplify the swing.
fp: Bastion Protector â‡„ Frontier Warmonger / Harsh Mentor / Village Bell-Ringer / Selfless Squire / Zealous Conscripts / Verge Rangers / Dearly Departed / Humble Defector / Fiend Hunter / Frontline Medic flagged as lordâ†’tribe â€” Bastion only pumps LEGENDARY creatures, and none of these are legendary, so all of these lord edges are false

Gilraen, DĂşnedain Protector â‡„ ~14 ETB creatures flagged as strong (s=3) etbâ†’blink â€” Gilraen returns a creature to hand on death (one-shot protection/recursion), not a repeatable blink engine, so the dense s=3 'blink-the-ETB-army' web is overstated
Gilraen â‡„ Banishing Light / Court of Ire / Marshal's Anthem as etbâ†’blink â€” these are enchantments, not creatures Gilraen can save/return, so the edges are spurious

Flamerush Rider â‡„ Banishing Light / Court of Ire / Fealty to the Realm flagged as copyâ†’trigger â€” Flamerush only copies an ATTACKING creature, it cannot copy enchantment ETBs, so these copy edges are wrong

Supreme Verdict â‡„ Bastion Protector / Frontline Medic / Unbreakable Formation tagged 'destroy' as synergy â€” this is really a board-wipe interacting with indestructible/protection (a defensive note), not a positive engine edge
fn: Human creature-type tribal axis is invisible: Vanquisher's Banner, Herald's Horn, Door of Destinies and many tokens key off the Human/Soldier subtype, but the taxonomy has no real creature-type tribal family â€” it collapses everything into a generic lordâ†’tribe and never recognizes the actual chosen-type subtheme
Goad is unmodeled as a payoff: Taunt from the Rampart (goad) sits as an island despite being a real political/aggro enabler that forces attacks; goad has a produce event but no consumer payoff family

Call for Aid is a go-wide token + monarch spell that SHOULD link to the go-wide/tribal-count payoffs (Erkenbrand, Beregond, Crown, Visions of Glory) but is listed as a zero-interaction island â€” a genuine missed token-maker
Gimli's Treasure production is not wired to the rampâ†’sink package (Treasure â†’ Forth Eorlingas!/Earthquake/Visions X-costs), missing a real mana-into-payoff line
issues: lordâ†’tribe family does not check the lord's actual buff condition (typed vs legendary) â€” Bastion Protector (legendary-only) is treated like a global anthem, massively over-connecting nonlegendary creatures and inflating degree/edges
etbâ†’blink family conflates a death-trigger return-to-hand (Gilraen) with true repeatable flicker, and even matches noncreature ETBs (enchantments), creating a phantom high-strength engine web
copyâ†’trigger does not gate on what the copier can legally copy â€” Flamerush Rider (attacking-creature-only) gets copy edges to enchantments and monarch enchantments
No creature-type/subtype tribal recognition: 'lordâ†’tribe' is applied so broadly it both over-counts (Bastion) and masks the real Human tribal theme
No goad payoff family and no token-spell recognition for Call for Aid, leaving real aggro/go-wide cards stranded as islands
Cohesion appears edge-count-sensitive; high-degree hub cards (Crown 40, Visions of Glory 45) plus the inflated lord/blink/copy edges can pad the score even when several of those edges are invalid

rawEvals.name: Squirreled Away (Bloomburrow Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Golgari Squirrel tribal tokens-go-wide aristocrats. Hazel of the Rootbloom copies the first token made each turn and turns Squirrels/Foods into mana. The deck floods the board with Squirrel and Food/Treasure tokens (Chatterstorm, Scurry of Squirrels, Squirrel Nest, Deep Forest Hermit, Academy Manufactor, Tireless Provisioner), doubles them (Second Harvest, Hazel, Chatterfang), then wins one of two ways: (1) go wide and swing with anthem/overrun payoffs (Beastmaster Ascension, End-Raze Forerunners, Sword of the Squeak, Garruk, Toski card draw), or (2) sacrifice the swarm to outlets (Ravenous Squirrel, Woe Strider, Chittering Witch, Moonstone Eulogist) and drain the table with death-trigger payoffs (Zulaport Cutthroat, Bastion of Remembrance, Poison-Tip Archer, Nadier's Nightblade). It is a token-engine deck, not a tight 2-card combo deck.
fp: Hazel of the Rootbloom â‡„ Plaguecrafter (copyâ†’trigger): Hazel copies a TOKEN entering, not a creature's ETB sacrifice trigger; Plaguecrafter makes no token so there is nothing for Hazel to copy â€” bogus edge.

Hazel of the Rootbloom â‡„ Skyfisher Spider / Honored Dreyleader (copyâ†’trigger): same issue â€” Hazel only copies the first token created each turn, not arbitrary ETB triggers, so these copyâ†’trigger links overstate the synergy.

Beastmaster Ascension â‡„ Zulaport Cutthroat / Poison-Tip Archer / Nadier's Nightblade (lordâ†’tribe, s1): Beastmaster Ascension is not a lord/anthem â€” it gives +5/+5 only after you attack with 5+ creatures; tagging it lordâ†’tribe with non-attacking aristocrat payoffs is a misclassification.

Arcane Signet / Sol Ring / Golgari Signet / Talisman â‡„ Beledros Witherbloom (untapâ†’tap-ability, s3): Beledros untaps LANDS (her own ability), not mana rocks; pairing rocks with her as a strong untapâ†’tap engine is a false combo-flavored edge.
Nested Shambler â‡„ Sol Ring/Arcane/Golgari/Talisman (rampâ†’sink, s1): Nested Shambler is a 1-mana 1/1, not a meaningful mana sink for ramp; these rampâ†’sink edges are noise.

Maelstrom Pulse / Putrefy / Windgrace's Judgment / Casualties / Saw in Half â‡„ Toski (destroy): tagging generic removal as 'interacting' with your own indestructible Toski is incidental, not a deck synergy.
fn: Skullclamp (deg 1, near-island): in an aristocrats token deck Skullclamp is a premier engine â€” equip a 1-toughness token, it dies, draw 2. The taxonomy has no equipâ†’sac-fodderâ†’draw event, so its single biggest card-advantage engine is essentially invisible (only an 'attach' link to Sword of the Squeak).

Food token engine / lifegain payoff loop: Gilded Goose, Prosperous Innkeeper, Tireless Provisioner, Academy Manufactor, Gourmand's Talent generate Food/lifegain that fuels Ravenous Squirrel and Witherbloom-style lifedrain; the classifier scatters these as weak 'lifegain'/'treasure' edges with no dedicated Food/eat-payoff family.

Hazel's actual mana-engine line (tap Squirrels + Foods for mana â†’ recast/Beledros loop): Hazel turning the token army into a mana battery feeding Beledros Witherbloom's pay-life-for-tokens and untap is a real rampâ†’sink/engine line the model only partially captured via scattered 'mana'/'untap' tags.

Maskwood Nexus changeling effect: it makes ALL your tokens/creatures Squirrels (and every type), massively amplifying every lord and tribal-count payoff; classifier only tags it as a generic token producer, missing the type-granting amplifier role.
issues: No equip/Aura-as-sac-fodder-draw family: Skullclamp + expendable tokens is a defining aristocrats engine with zero representation in the taxonomy.

Global-payoff edge inflation: a single 'tribal-countâ†’payoff' (Shamanic Revelation, Sword of the Squeak, Swarmyard Massacre) or single sac-outlet links to nearly every creature, mechanically inflating avgDeg/edges and cohesion for any go-wide deck â€” the metric rewards token soup density rather than discrete synergy depth.

copyâ†’trigger gate too loose for restricted copiers: Hazel copies only the first token each turn, but the classifier links her copyâ†’trigger to many ETB creatures that produce no token, fabricating synergy.
untapâ†’tap-ability marked strong (s3) for mana rocks + Beledros even though Beledros only untaps lands â€” the family does not check WHAT gets untapped vs WHAT the tapper needs.
No Food/lifegain-matters family despite a heavy Food subtheme; lifegain payoffs are scattered as weak generic edges.
No type-granting/changeling amplifier modeling (Maskwood Nexus) that multiplies tribal payoffs.

rawEvals.name: Animated Army (Bloomburrow Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Gruul "animate-your-noncreature-permanents" big-mana combat midrange. Bello, Bard of the Brambles turns high-mana-value artifacts/enchantments (and Bello also draws off big creatures) into 4/4+ attackers, so the deck ramps hard into expensive permanents and beefy creatures (Ghalta, Etali) and closes with combat damage backed by overrun/anthem effects (Garruk's Uprising, Berserkers' Onslaught, Goreclaw). Secondary engines: landfall tokens, treasure ramp, X-spell/big-mana sinks (Sunbird's Invocation, Starstorm, Ghalta), and a Greater Good draw/sac outlet.
fp: Rolling Hamsphere â‡„ ~25 creatures via tribal-countâ†’payoff â€” its deg of 42 treats it as a global typed-count payoff touching nearly every body; in practice it is one card whose 'X creatures' interactions are vastly over-instanced, inflating avgDeg and largestWebShare

Pyreswipe Hawk â‡„ every mana rock via rampâ†’sink (deg 20) â€” Pyreswipe Hawk's escalate/raid is a marginal mana sink, not a real payoff worth pairing with all 14 rocks; this is the generic 'every producer to every consumer' fan-out, not a designed synergy

Bello â‡„ Abrade / Beast Within / Decimate / Spine of Ish Sah via 'destroy' â€” these are flagged as commander synergy but Bello's combat trigger has nothing to do with these removal spells; the 'destroy' family is matching Bello's consume tag spuriously
Domri, Anarch of Bolas â‡„ many creatures via lordâ†’tribe â€” Domri is treated as a creature-type lord, but its +1 ramp/fight and -3 are not a tribal anthem the way the 22 lordâ†’tribe edges imply
fn: Bello's defining mechanic â€” animating noncreature artifacts/enchantments with MV 4+ into attacking creatures â€” has NO family in the taxonomy. The core line (Bello + Bootleggers' Stash / Sunbird's Invocation / Greater Good / Primeval Bounty / Rolling Hamsphere / Rain of Riches becoming 4/4+ beaters that draw cards) is entirely absent; this is the whole deck and it is uncounted
No 'big-creature-attack â†’ card draw' payoff family for Bello's own draw trigger and Garruk's Uprising / Garruk's Packleader (power-based draw), which reward the animate-and-swing plan
Ghalta / Etali / animated permanents as evasive/unblockable threats (Bello grants 'can't be blocked by smaller creatures') is not modeled as an evasion/combat-finisher synergy
issues: No event/family for 'animate noncreature permanent' (the commander's entire identity) â€” a clear taxonomy gap for Gruul/animation commanders like Bello
rampâ†’sink generates dense all-pairs edges (108 instances) that dominate the graph and overstate cohesion for what is just generic ramp + generic sinks
tribal-countâ†’payoff lets a single payoff (Rolling Hamsphere) reach extreme degree (42), skewing avgDeg/largestWebShare and masking the missing real engine
Commander node degree is anchored only by incidental consume tags (attack/destroy) rather than its actual ability, so the most important card scores as one of the least connected (deg 7)

rawEvals.name: Temur Roar (Tarkir Dragonstorm Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Dragon tribal midrange/aggro (Temur)
fp: Dragon Tempest treated as a rampâ†’sink target of Arcane Signet/Sol Ring/Fellwar/Talismans â€” Dragon Tempest's mana ability is a minor late-game outlet; its real function is a tribal ETB-burn enchantment, so the rampâ†’sink edges misrepresent why it matters
Steel Hellkite â‡„ Nesting Dragon via 'pump' â€” these don't interact; Steel Hellkite pumps itself with its own mana ability and Nesting Dragon's pump is landfall-based, no shared synergy

Elemental Bond/Temur Ascendancy/Frontier Siege â‡„ Hammerhead Tyrant via 'bounce' â€” Hammerhead's bounce is an attack trigger on opponents' creatures, not a self-bounce loop feeding those draw enchantments; spurious

Reality Shift â‡„ Stormbreath Dragon via millâ†’graveyard-payoff â€” Stormbreath's graveyard-size payoff (monstrosity-ish lifeloss is actually flying haste; the graveyard read is wrong) is not fed by Reality Shift exiling one opponent's creature

Vengeful Ancestor â‡„ several dragons via combatâ†’payoff â€” its goad/forced-attack value is real but the per-dragon 'combatâ†’payoff' edges to Dragonmaster Outcast/Gadrak/Lathliss/Rapacious overcount a single political effect as many synergies
fn: Dragon Tempest as a tribal ETB-burn payoff: every dragon (and dragon token) entering pings for its power â€” the central repeatable damage engine â€” has no 'dragon-etbâ†’damage' family
Lathliss, Dragon Queen + nontoken dragons = a 5/5 dragon token each, a true token-generating tribal payoff, essentially missed (only generic go-wide edges to Avalanche)

Dragon cost-reduction â†’ dragon-cast chain: Dragonlord's Servant, Nogi, Sarkhan Soul Aflame, Dragon's Hoard discount your dragons, but cost-reducerâ†’ability is never wired to the dragon bodies it enables

Ureni of the Unwritten's own engine â€” attack trigger to put a creature from hand/top onto the battlefield (cheat fatties) â€” is not modeled; commander shows deg 1 with only a single Become the Avalanche edge

Treasure â†’ big-dragon ramp synergy is only partially captured; treasure producers (Gadrak/Rapacious/Atsushi) feed expensive dragons but mostly link to Steel Hellkite/Avalanche rather than the dragon curve
issues: No 'tribe-ETBâ†’payoff' (e.g. dragon-entersâ†’damage/token) family, so Dragon Tempest and Lathliss â€” the deck's signature engines â€” are invisible or mislabeled as rampâ†’sink
cost-reducer capability is detected but has no edge family connecting reducers to the creatures/spells they discount
Become the Avalanche dominates the graph (deg 43) and inflates tribal-countâ†’payoff (36 instances) and avgDeg, making cohesion look higher than the deck's actual line-to-line synergy density
rampâ†’sink over-fires on any 'has-tap-ability' mana source vs any 'is-mana-sink', producing many low-value edges (Dragon Tempest, Steel Hellkite) that are not the deck's plan
Commander Ureni's battlefield-cheat attack trigger has no representing event, so the build-around is under-weighted to deg 1

rawEvals.name: Counter Intelligence (Edge of Eternities Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Artifact-centric +1/+1 and charge-counter "proliferate matters" midrange. It loads counters onto artifacts/creatures (Steel Overseer, Hangarback, charge-counter mana rocks), multiplies them (Deepglow Skate), proliferates en masse (Thrummingbird, Tekuthal, Kilo, Surge Conductor, Patrolling Peacemaker, Experimental Augury, Ripples of Potential, Tezzeret's Gambit), and cashes counters into payoffs: Darksteel Reactor (20 charge = win), Lux Cannon / Lux Artillery (removal/damage), Titan Forge & Golem Foundry (golem tokens), and combat beatdown via Kappa Cannoneer / Threefold Thunderhulk. Proliferate doubles as ramp by growing charge-counter rocks.
fp: Inspirit lordâ†’tribe edges to noncreature artifacts like Darksteel Reactor are conceptually fine, but lordâ†’tribe edges such as Inspirit â‡„ Emry / Jhoira / Alibou treat 'artifact creature buff' as a synergy with cards that contribute nothing back to the counter plan â€” thin filler edges

proliferateâ†’counters Thrummingbird â‡„ Solar Array / Moxite Refinery etc.: every proliferator is wired to every counter-bearer as strength-2, but proliferating a 1-shot mana rock or a vanilla creature is near-irrelevant; the clique inflates degree far beyond real play impact

rampâ†’sink edges like Sol Ring / Arcane Signet â‡„ Pull from Tomorrow / Universal Surveillance / Chain Reaction are generic 'ramp feeds an X-spell' links present in almost any blue deck, not a deck-defining synergy here

Deepglow Skate â‡„ Everflowing Chalice / Astral Cornucopia counter-multiplier (s3) is real but minor â€” doubling charge counters on a mana rock is a fringe line, scored as high as doubling Darksteel Reactor

sac-fodderâ†’outlet edges to Threefold Thunderhulk are over-broad: it is a one-time ETB token-maker/relevant body, not a repeatable sac outlet, so treating every artifact creature as 'fodder' for it overstates an aristocrats line that does not exist
fn: No countersâ†’payoff / threshold family: Darksteel Reactor (20 charge = you win the game) is the deck's marquee alternate wincon and shows up only as a 'destroy' consumer and proliferate target â€” the actual proliferateâ†’Reactor win line is uncaptured
Lux Cannon and Lux Artillery (charge counters convert into Vindicate-style removal / damage) â€” the counters-as-fuel-for-removal payoff is missed; only flagged as generic destroy/damage
Titan Forge and Golem Foundry (accumulate counters â†’ make 9/9 or 3/3 golem tokens) â€” the countersâ†’token-payoff engine is absent from the taxonomy

Emry's actual engine (cast artifacts from graveyard / recursion, plus self-mill) and Wake the Past / Jhoira card-draw-on-historic are barely modeled â€” only 1-2 thin 'cast'/'graveyard' edges, missing the artifact-recursion value loop
Steel Overseer / Inspirit as anthem-style payoffs that scale with the counter count are only seen as lord/counter sources, not as the go-wide combat payoff the deck closes with
issues: Missing 'countersâ†’payoff/threshold' event family: cards that DO something when counters reach a number (Darksteel Reactor win, Lux Cannon/Artillery, Titan Forge, Golem Foundry) have no producing/consuming event, so the deck's literal win condition is invisible to cohesion

proliferateâ†’counters is modeled as a complete bipartite clique (proliferator Ă— every has-counters permanent) producing 250 edge instances and dominating familyBreakdown â€” this massively inflates avgDeg (13.67) and edge count (436) and should be capped or weighted by target relevance
counter-multiplier (Deepglow Skate) is similarly all-to-all and undifferentiated; doubling a payoff vs. doubling a vanilla rock score identically

hasCombo=false is technically correct (no infinite loop), but the classifier has no notion of a 'soft' deterministic wincon like Reactor-via-proliferate, so a deck with a real alternate win route reads as comboless
Commander field shows Emry rather than the precon's face Kilo, Apogee Mind â€” possible data/ingest mismatch that could skew which card anchors the web

rawEvals.name: Blight Curse (Lorwyn Eclipsed Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Golgari (BG) -1/-1 counters / "wither matters" midrange-attrition deck commanded by Auntie Ool, Cursewretch. It floods the board with -1/-1 counter sources (Black Sun's Zenith, Grim Poppet, Midnight Banshee, Carnifex Demon, Soul Snuffers, Archfiend of Ifnir, Incremental Blight, The Reaper) acting as repeatable removal/board control, then converts those counters into value through dedicated payoffs: Hapatra + Flourishing Defenses + Blowfly Infestation (counter â†’ token / chain-kill engine), Necroskitter (steal creatures dying with -1/-1 counters), and Devoted Druid (untap via counter). A proliferate sub-theme (Contagion Clasp, Evolution Sage, Vraska Betrayal's Sting) and a counter-multiplier (Ferrafor, Young Yew) amplify the counters to finish boards. Wins by grinding the table out with recurring wraths-on-a-stick plus token/reanimation value, not via a fast combo.
fp: Skinrender â‡„ Soul Snuffers [debuff] â€” two creatures that independently put -1/-1 counters on ETB are not synergistic with each other; this is theme-sharing, not interaction (the whole strength-1 debuff clique is inflated this way: Black Sun's Zenith â‡„ Carnifex Demon, Midnight Banshee â‡„ Grim Poppet, etc.)

Auntie Ool â‡„ (every debuff source) [debuff s1] â€” the commander CONSUMES debuff (rewards creatures opponents lost to curses) but is wired to every counter source as if a flat synergy; most are noise rather than the actual draw payoff
Sol Ring â‡„ Fire Covenant / Sol Ring â‡„ Chain Reaction [rampâ†’sink] â€” generic mana-rock-to-X-spell edges that exist in every deck and aren't deck-specific synergy

Ferrafor â‡„ Lasting Tarfire / Ferrafor â‡„ Burning Curiosity [counter-multiplier s3] â€” flagged strong, but doubling a one-shot damage enchantment's incidental counters is marginal, not a strength-3 engine edge
fn: No 'wither/-1/-1 counter â†’ token' family: Hapatra, Vizier of Poisons and Flourishing Defenses and Blowfly Infestation make a token (or re-trigger) every time a -1/-1 counter is placed â€” the deck's central value engine â€” but they register only as generic debuff, so the counterâ†’token payoff loop is invisible

Necroskitter's signature ability (when a creature dies with a -1/-1 counter, reanimate it to your side) has no event â€” it sits at deg 18 wired only as a debuff source, missing its wither-steal/reanimation payoff entirely

Devoted Druid as a counter-untap / soft-combo enabler is uninstrumented: it puts -1/-1 counters on itself and is in a shell full of counter-removal/proliferate; the untapâ†’mana engine vector and Devoted Druid's combo notoriety are not modeled (loops=0, hasCombo=false)

No '-1/-1 counter â†’ board wipe / mass debuff' recognition that distinguishes the repeatable proliferate-fed wipes (Grim Poppet + proliferate, Black Sun's Zenith X-scaling) from one-shot effects â€” the killing engine reads as flat strength-1 noise
Tree of Perdition's build-around (set a player to 13, then swap life totals) is a deg-0 island with no event, missing a genuine value/wincon line
issues: No directed 'wither/-1/-1 counter â†’ payoff' family â€” the single biggest gap; the deck's actual engine (counter placed â†’ token/steal/reanimate) cannot be represented

The debuff family is undirected and forms a fully-connected clique among all -1/-1 sources, conflating 'shares a theme' with 'interacts', inflating avgDeg and edge counts while the real sourceâ†’payoff edges go unweighted

Cohesion formula appears to under-credit a deck whose theme is carried by a large same-family group: an extremely on-theme precon lands in the 'Loosely connected' band because directed engine edges are missing and generic islands drag the score

Necroskitter-style 'creature dies with -1/-1 counter' and counter-untap (Devoted Druid) triggers are absent from the taxonomy, causing both false negatives and an arguably too-conservative hasCombo=false
rampâ†’sink fires on generic mana-rock + any X/damage spell, adding deck-agnostic padding edges

rawEvals.name: Sultai Arisen (Tarkir Dragonstorm Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Sultai graveyard-value / self-mill reanimator midrange. Mill and dump-to-yard enablers (Hedron Crab, Stitcher's Supplier, Satyr Wayfinder, Grisly Salvage, Forbidden Alchemy, Grapple with the Past, Millikin, Skull Prophet, Nyx Weaver, Crawling Sensation) fuel a critical mass of graveyard payoffs: mass reanimation (Living Death, Necromantic Selection), targeted reanimation/recursion (Meren, Junji, Will of the Sultai, Floral Evoker, Timeless Witness, Phyrexian Reclamation, Reassembling Skeleton, Gravecrawler), graveyard-size beaters (Lord of Extinction, Consuming Aberration, Multani, Tasigur, Jarad), and card advantage from delve/escape/disturb. Teval turns each first-creature-cast into a mill + 2/2 plant token. Wins via reanimated fatties, a Jarad sacrifice-fling, or going wide with plants and beating down â€” a value grindpile, not a combo deck.
fp: Avenger of Zendikar â‡„ Amphin Mutineer / Timeless Witness (copyâ†’trigger): these copy/clone edges are spurious â€” Amphin Mutineer and Timeless Witness are not copy effects relevant to Avenger; the 'is-copy' capability is misassigned (Timeless Witness has no copy ability; Amphin Mutineer creates a Fish token, not a copy), so the entire copyâ†’trigger family (26 instances) is largely phantom

Noxious Gearhulk / Springbloom Druid / Disciple of Bolas â‡„ Timeless Witness & Amphin Mutineer (copyâ†’trigger): same misclassification â€” these are ETB creatures, not copy effects, so flagging a copyâ†’trigger synergy is wrong

Teval â‡„ many graveyard cards at strength 1: most of these are not true pairwise synergies but co-membership in 'cares about graveyard' â€” e.g. Teval â‡„ Treasure Cruise or Teval â‡„ Phyrexian Reclamation is just two cards that both touch the yard, not an interaction

Lord of the Forsaken â‡„ Welcome the Dead tagged with FOUR families (graveyard/rampâ†’sink/sac-fodderâ†’outlet/millâ†’graveyard-payoff): over-stacked; this is double/quadruple-counting one loose relationship
fn: No DELVE / ESCAPE / ESCAPE-from-graveyard cost-reduction event: Treasure Cruise, Tasigur, Kotis (escape-like), and Necropolis Fiend (delve) literally exile the graveyard to pay costs â€” this is the deck's signature 'fill yard = cheaper spells' engine and the taxonomy has no event for it, so it is invisible

No DREDGE / recursive-self-mill loop event: Life from the Loam (dredge 3) + Crawling Sensation + Hedron Crab is a real engine; Afterlife from the Loam and Loam-style recursion are flattened into generic graveyard edges

No GRAVEYARD-SIZE-PAYOFF directional event: Lord of Extinction, Consuming Aberration, Multani, Jarad are tagged 'is-graveyard-size-payoff' as a capability but there is no event connecting EVERY mill source to them â€” only a handful of millâ†’graveyard-payoff edges (12) exist, vastly undercounting

No REANIMATION-target synergy: the deck runs big ETB/death-trigger creatures (Noxious Gearhulk, Avenger of Zendikar, Colossal Grave-Reaver) specifically to be cheated in by Living Death / Necromantic Selection / Will of the Sultai / Floral Evoker â€” 'reanimate' is a produced event but there is no family linking reanimators to high-value reanimation TARGETS
No PLANT-TOKENS / go-wide payoff: Teval and Avenger make plant tokens and Jarad/Ob Nixilis can leverage a wide board, but token-go-wide is essentially absent from the breakdown
issues: Band/scoring logic mislabels a high-cohesion single-engine deck as 'Pile of good-stuff' at 25 â€” a mono-family web with 90% interactive and 90% largest-web-share should score HIGH, not low; the score seems to reward family DIVERSITY over depth, which punishes focused graveyard/tribal decks

The generic 'graveyard' family is too coarse: it conflates thematic co-occurrence with real directional synergy (millâ†’payoff, reanimateâ†’target), inflating edge count (702) while hiding the actual engine structure

Missing taxonomy events for core graveyard mechanics: delve/escape cost-reduction, dredge/self-mill loops, reanimation-target matching, and graveyard-size payoff scaling â€” all central to this deck and to Golgari/Sultai graveyard archetypes generally
copyâ†’trigger family is firing on false 'is-copy' capability assignments (Timeless Witness, Amphin Mutineer), producing ~26 phantom edges and a misleading combo-ish signal
Edge strength is nearly all 1 (weak) even for the deck's strongest lines (millâ†’Consuming Aberration/Lord of Extinction), so the weightedAvgDeg of 5.86 undercounts true synergy density

rawEvals.name: Peace Offering (Bloomburrow Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Bant (GWU) group-hug / pillowfort tied to a noncreature-spellslinger payoff engine. Ms. Bumbleflower turns every noncreature spell into "put a +1/+1 counter + draw a card," so the deck wins along two intertwined axes: (1) card-draw value that snowballs into draw-payoffs (Psychosis Crawler pings the table down, Chasm Skulker grows huge, Triskaidekaphile/Body of Knowledge), and (2) +1/+1 counter accumulation doubled by Kalonian Hydra / Communal Brewing into a few large evasive threats and Simic Ascendancy alt-win. The "peace offering" shell hands opponents resources (Tempt with Bunnies/Discovery, Selvala, Rites of Flourishing, group-draw spells, goad/pillowfort via Baird/Mangara/Martial Impetus) to stay alive while out-valuing the table. Not a true combo deck.
fp: Mr. Foxglove â‡„ Octomancer / Fisher's Talent / Bloodroot Apothecary / Perch Protection (combatâ†’payoff): Foxglove cares about creatures dying / graveyard size and lifegain, not about these token-makers attacking â€” these are spurious combat edges, no real synergy line.

Twenty-Toed Toad â‡„ Octomancer/Bloodroot/Perch (go-wideâ†’payoff, combatâ†’payoff): Toad is a single-creature beater that grows from noncreature casts; treating scattered 1/1 token-makers as a go-wide payoff engine overstates a board-wide plan the deck doesn't have.

Communal Brewing â‡„ ramp rocks (Sol Ring/Arcane Signet/Fellwar/Thought Vessel) as rampâ†’sink: Communal Brewing's mana sink is incidental; pairing every mana rock with it inflates the edge count without representing a real intended line.

Octomancer â‡„ Coiling Oracle / Loran / Sphinx (copyâ†’trigger): Octomancer copies itself making Octopus tokens, it does not copy other creatures' ETBs, so these copyâ†’trigger edges are mechanically wrong.
Martial Impetus â‡„ Swiftfoot Boots (attach): both are equip/aura-style 'attach' cards but they do not interact with each other â€” false co-attachment edge.
fn: The commander's actual keystone â€” 'cast a NONCREATURE spell â†’ +1/+1 counter AND draw' â€” is not modeled as a distinct cast-payoff family; it is smeared into generic 'draw', so the spellslinger-as-counter-engine line (the whole reason the noncreature spell count matters) is invisible.

Group-hug / shared-resource political family is entirely absent: Tempt with Bunnies, Tempt with Discovery, Rites of Flourishing, Selvala Explorer Returned, Kwain, Tenuous Truce, Intellectual Offering, Secret Rendezvous all give opponents cards/lands â€” a core archetype with no event in the taxonomy.

Pillowfort / 'tax to attack' deterrence (Baird Steward of Argive, Mangara the Diplomat, Ghostly Prison-style defense, goad redirection via Martial Impetus) has no family â€” Baird is even flagged an island despite being a defining deck-identity card.
