Simic Ascendancy alternate-win (20 growth counters) is treated only as a counter-multiplier sink, not as an alt-win-condition payoff tied to the +1/+1 theme.
Fog/protection sub-theme (Spore Frog, Riot Control, Illusionist's Gambit, Perplexing Test) that protects the group-hug pilot is uncaptured â€” three of these are islands.
issues: No 'noncreature-cast â†’ payoff' (spellslinger/magecraft-like) family; commander is the deck's engine yet its trigger collapses into generic draw, hiding the counter+draw double payoff.
No group-hug / shared-symmetric-resource family, so a whole precon archetype scores as disconnected islands (Tempt with Discovery, Cultivate, Farseek flagged as islands).
No pillowfort / attack-tax / deterrence family â€” Baird Steward of Argive (a signature card) becomes a degree-0 island.
copyâ†’trigger gate is too loose: it fires self-copy/token-doubler Octomancer against arbitrary ETB creatures, generating mechanically false combo-ish edges.
combatâ†’payoff and go-wideâ†’payoff are over-applied to incidental token-makers, inflating edge count and the 84% web share without representing real lines.
Rampâ†’sink over-weights generic mana rocks against any 'X' or activated-ability card (Communal Brewing), padding cohesion.

rawEvals.name: Scions & Spellcraft (Final Fantasy Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Esper (WUB) lifegain-spellslinger / "lifeswing" value deck built around Y'shtola, Night's Blessed. Y'shtola converts life-loss into card draw and card draw into lifegain, so the deck wants to chain cheap noncreature spells, gain/lose life, and draw cards. Secondary engines: magecraft spellcast payoffs (Archmage Emeritus, Fandaniel), a token/aristocrats sub-package (Hildibrand, Lingering Souls, Hermes, Bastion of Remembrance), and an X-spell life-drain finish (Exsanguinate). Wins by grinding incremental advantage and draining the table via Bastion/Exsanguinate, not by combat or a combo.
fp: The ~111 'cast' edges (e.g. Y'shtola â‡„ Lingering Souls, Emet-Selch â‡„ Hraesvelgr, Transpose â‡„ Lyse Hext) â€” these wire generic 'when you cast a spell' or cost-reducer creatures to every spell in the deck; shared color/cast-trigger is not a targeted synergy and massively inflates avgDeg

rampâ†’sink edges from vanilla mana rocks to X-spells (e.g. Sol Ring â‡„ Exsanguinate, Talisman of Dominance â‡„ G'raha Tia, Thought Vessel â‡„ Lethal Scheme) â€” generic ramp into any mana-using card is not a deckbuilt engine, just normal mana

copyâ†’trigger edges anchored on Summon: Good King Mog XII / Blue Mage's Cane / Rite of Replication â‡„ Baleful Strix / White Auracite / Coveted Jewel â€” these are speculative 'if you copy an ETB' lines, not intended synergies the deck is built around

attach edges among Equipment/Auras (Dancer's Chakrams â‡„ Reaper's Scythe â‡„ Sage's Nouliths â‡„ Astrologian's Planisphere) â€” co-presence of equip cards is treated as mutual synergy when they don't actually interact
fn: Y'shtola's lifegainâ†”drawâ†”lifeloss loop â€” the deck's defining engine is entirely absent. No family links life-loss sources (Exsanguinate, Bastion, Circle of Power, Papalymo, Murderous Rider, Snuff Out as life payment) to Y'shtola's 'whenever you lose life, draw' nor draw spells back to her 'whenever you draw, gain life'

lifegain-matters / lifegain-payoff family generally â€” Y'shtola, Urianger, Krile, G'raha all care about life totals and there is no 'lifegain' interaction family at all (lifegain appears only as a produced tag, never as a consumed/payoff event)

graveyard-size / spell-recursion payoffs â€” Krile Baldesion (cares about graveyard) and Emet-Selch / Torrential Gearhulk / Dig Through Time recurring instants/sorceries form a real value loop only weakly modeled by the 'graveyard' tag
Astrologian's Planisphere as a card-draw engine hub feeding Y'shtola â€” its draw edges exist but are disconnected from the life/draw payoff that makes them matter
issues: No 'lifegain' or 'lifelossâ†’payoff' interaction family in the taxonomy â€” fatal for a commander whose entire identity is life-total manipulation; lifegain/lifeloss exist only as produced events with no consumer/payoff side

'cast' family is far too promiscuous: linking every cost-reducer / cast-trigger creature to every spell produces a dense pseudo-web (111 edges) that inflates avgDeg (9.78) and largestWebShare (97%) without reflecting real synergy
rampâ†’sink over-weighted (49 edges): generic mana rocks â†’ any X/mana-sink card should not count as engine edges unless the sink is itself a payoff

Despite the inflated edge count, the cohesion landed at 48 ('Loosely connected') which happens to be about right for a battlecruiser precon â€” but it is right for the wrong reasons (noise inflated the score while the true engine was missed, roughly cancelling out)

rawEvals.name: Limit Break (Final Fantasy Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Mono-white Equipment-Voltron / artifact-matters aggro. Cloud, Ex-SOLDIER rewards equipped attackers with card draw, Treasure, and Hero tokens, and the deck stacks a large Equipment suite onto a few threats. Card advantage comes from Puresteel Paladin (free equip + draw on Equipment ETB), Mask of Memory, and Skullclamp; Armory Automaton and Bronze Guardian act as artifact/equipment aggregators. It wins by suiting up an evasive attacker and connecting (Voltron), backed by indestructible protection (Bastion Protector, Darksteel Plate) and a board-wipe removal package.
fp: Bronze Guardian â‡„ ~16 creatures (Yuffie, Vincent, Aerith, Bugenhagen, etc.) via 'tribal-countâ†’payoff' â€” Bronze Guardian keys off artifacts/protection, not creature count; these are fabricated tribal edges
Bastion Protector â‡„ ~20 legendary creatures via 'lordâ†’tribe' â€” it is a blanket +1/+1 + indestructible anthem on legendaries, not a tribal payoff engine; treated as 24 distinct synergy edges
Board wipes cross-linked via 'destroy' (Austere Command â‡„ Vanquish the Horde â‡„ Cloud's Limit Break â‡„ Vandalblast â‡„ Decimate) â€” redundant removal is not mutual synergy

rawEvals.name: Eldrazi Unbound (Commander Masters Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Mono-colorless big-mana ramp/goodstuff. Flood the board with mana rocks (Sol Ring, Thran Dynamo, Hedron Archive, Dreamstone Hedron, Worn Powerstone, Forsaken Monument), then dump enormous Eldrazi/colorless artifact threats. The signature engine is the commander Zhulodok, Void Gorger: casting a MV-7+ spell free-casts the top of your library if it is also MV 7+ (a chained free-cast/cost-reduction engine). Forsaken Monument doubles colorless mana and anthems Eldrazi Spawn/Scion tokens. Wins through huge annihilator/trample bodies and incidental ETB value, not a combo.
fp: Forsaken Monument â‡„ Crashing Drawbridge / Suspicious Bookcase / Burnished Hart / Geode Golem (lordâ†’tribe): Forsaken Monument only buffs COLORLESS creatures and doubles colorless mana; tagging it as a generic 'lord' over every artifact/colorless body produces ~22 near-meaningless anthem edges that overstate cohesion

Metalwork Colossus â‡„ Crashing Drawbridge / Suspicious Bookcase / Burnished Hart / Mazemind-tier fodder (sac-fodderâ†’outlet): Metalwork Colossus does not sacrifice creatures to recur â€” it sacrifices ARTIFACTS to itself for recursion; treating every artifact creature as 'fodder for an outlet' invents a sac engine the deck doesn't run
Kozilek, the Great Distortion â‡„ every mana rock (rampâ†’sink): Kozilek's discard-to-counter is gated on emptying your hand, not a free mana sink; ~15 rampâ†’sink edges to it are mostly notional
Abstruse Archaic â‡„ Meteor Golem / Solemn Simulacrum (copyâ†’trigger, str 2): Abstruse Archaic copies INSTANT/SORCERY spells, not creature ETBs, so these copyâ†’trigger edges are mechanically wrong
fn: Zhulodok, Void Gorger free-cast engine: casting an MV7+ spell free-casts the top card if MV7+ â€” the deck's defining cost-reduction/cascade payoff, entirely absent from the graph (commander shows only trivial 'cast' edges, deg 4)

Eldrazi annihilator / 'leaves the battlefield' value: It That Betrays steals opponents' permanents when they sacrifice, Artisan of Kozilek reanimates on cast â€” no taxonomy event captures the annihilator-sacrifice or cast-trigger reanimation lines

Spell-cost-reduction cluster: Ancient Stone Idol, Ugin the Ineffable, and Not of This World all reduce colorless/Eldrazi costs, which directly fuels Zhulodok's MV7+ casts â€” no cost-reductionâ†’big-cast family edges were drawn
Eldrazi Scion/Spawn token ramp loop: Ancient Stone Idol/Warping Wail/Myriad Construct make tokens that sac for mana under Forsaken Monument's doubler â€” a token-ramp line not modeled
issues: No event for 'cast-cost-gated free cast / cascade' (Zhulodok-style), so the deck's headline engine is invisible â€” the commander is treated as a vanilla MV7+ caster

lordâ†’tribe over-fires: a colorless/Eldrazi anthem like Forsaken Monument should not generate a full-mesh lord edge to every artifact creature regardless of relevance, inflating edge count and largestWebShare
sac-fodderâ†’outlet conflates artifact-sacrifice recursion (Metalwork Colossus) with creature-sacrifice aristocrats; Metalwork Colossus sacrifices ARTIFACTS to itself, not creatures to an outlet
copyâ†’trigger family does not distinguish spell-copy (Abstruse Archaic) from permanent/ETB-copy, producing wrong str-2 edges
rampâ†’sink treats conditional payoffs (Kozilek's empty-hand counter) as generic mana sinks, weakening edge signal

rawEvals.name: Explorers of the Deep  (The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Simic Merfolk tribal counters/explore go-wide aggro. Hakbal explores every Merfolk on attack to bury counters, lords (Coralhelm Commander, Merfolk Sovereign, Master of the Pearl Trident, Merrow Reejerey, Merfolk Mistbinder) pump the team, counter-doublers (Branching Evolution, Hardened Scales, Vorel, Metallic Mimic, Sage of Fables) and proliferate (Evolution Sage, Merfolk Skydiver, Ripples of Potential) snowball the counters, and unblockable/islandwalk enablers (Master of the Pearl Trident, Kumena, Cold-Eyed Selkie) plus draw payoffs (Tishana, Kindred Discovery, Seafloor Oracle, Kumena) close the game through tribal combat damage. No real combo â€” it is a fair counters/tribal beatdown precon.
fp: Sol Ring â‡„ Kiora's Follower (untapâ†’tap-ability, flagged combo-critical s4): untapping a Sol Ring with Kiora's Follower nets +1 colorless mana once per turn â€” it is not an infinite or combo-critical interaction in this deck, no payoff turns it into a loop

Arcane Signet â‡„ Kiora's Follower / Simic Signet â‡„ Kiora's Follower / Commander's Sphere â‡„ Kiora's Follower (untapâ†’tap-ability, all flagged combo-critical s4): untapping a signet for 1 mana is trivial value, not a combo â€” these four pairs alone drive the hasCombo=true flag and are all false positives
Curse of the Swine â‡„ Sol Ring/Simic Signet/Commander's Sphere (rampâ†’sink): Curse of the Swine is X-cost removal, not a synergistic mana sink that 'wants' the ramp â€” generic and largely noise

Metallic Mimic â‡„ Merfolk Sovereign/Merrow Reejerey/Master of the Pearl Trident tagged lordâ†’tribe at s1: Metallic Mimic only puts a counter on entry and names a type; pairing it as a lord recipient is marginal

Beast Within / Rapid Hybridization â‡„ Svyelun/Thassa/Inspiring Call (destroy): these are removal/protection spells, not a synergy with your own creatures â€” flagging them as interaction edges is noise
fn: EXPLORE as a counter/card-advantage engine is under-modeled: Hakbal's attack trigger explores EVERY Merfolk (often 5-10 explores at once), and Nicanzil/Topography Tracker/Merfolk Cave-Diver pile on. Explore both grows creatures with +1/+1 counters AND filters/draws lands â€” it should feed both the counters family and the landfall/draw families heavily, but it only registers 4 weak explore edges

Unblockable / evasion enabler line missed: Master of the Pearl Trident (islandwalk), Kumena's unblockable ability, and Cold-Eyed Selkie's islandwalk are how this go-wide deck actually deals damage â€” there is no 'evasion-grantâ†’combat-payoff' family, so the win condition's key enabler is invisible

Kindred Discovery as a tribal card-draw engine is missed: with Merfolk constantly entering (explore tokens, Deeproot Waters, Emperor Mihail II) and attacking, Kindred Discovery is a major draw engine, but it only shows weak 'bounce' edges and no tribal-ETBâ†’draw family
Deeproot Waters / Emperor Mihail II token-generation on Merfolk spellcast is not connected to the go-wide/tribal-count payoffs as a producing engine â€” it is only tagged via weak 'cast' edges
issues: No 'explore' payoff/engine modeling: explore is treated as a 4-edge weak curiosity despite being the deck's titular and primary mechanic that simultaneously fuels counters and landfall â€” taxonomy needs an exploreâ†’counters and exploreâ†’card-selection event

Combo gate too loose for untapâ†’tap-ability: untapping a mana rock (Sol Ring, signets, Commander's Sphere) with Kiora's Follower is auto-flagged combo-critical (s4) with no payoff/loop check, falsely setting hasCombo=true on a fair precon
No evasion-granting â†’ combat-payoff family: islandwalk/unblockable enablers (Master of the Pearl Trident, Kumena, Cold-Eyed Selkie) that are the literal win condition are not captured

counter-multiplier family appears over-weighted (92 instances): cards that produce a single counter once are paired with every doubler, inflating edge count and cohesion beyond the real recurring-engine density
rampâ†’sink edges fire on generic X-spells/removal (Curse of the Swine, Thieving Skydiver) rather than true mana sinks, adding noise

rawEvals.name: Counter Blitz (Final Fantasy Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: +1/+1 counters midrange / go-wide tribal (Bant counters-matter). It snowballs counters onto a wide board, multiplies them with proliferate (Tidus, Grateful Apparition, Inexorable Tide, Lulu, Tromell) and "double counters placed" effects (Yuna, Grand Summoner; Tromell; Altered Ego; Hardened Scales as a modifier), then converts that into wins via combat/overrun payoffs (Sphere Grid, Wakka, Lulu) and counters-tribal card draw (Inspiring Call). Walking Ballista is the counter-based reach/finisher. No infinite combo â€” it wins by going wide and tall and attacking.
fp: Altered Ego â‡„ ~30 has-counters bodies (counter-multiplier, s3) â€” Altered Ego is a one-time clone-as-it-enters, not an ongoing 'double counters placed' engine; its huge edge count massively overstates a single ETB effect

Yuna, Grand Summoner â‡„ every has-counters card flagged counter-multiplier s3 â€” Yuna only doubles counters that are PUT ON, so static counter bodies (Sunscorch Regent, Shelinda, Kimahri) get a strong synergy edge they don't actually receive

Sol Ring / Arcane Signet / Everflowing Chalice â‡„ Chasm Skulker / Yuna's Whistle / Maester Seymour (rampâ†’sink) â€” generic mana rocks feeding any mana sink is incidental fixing, not a deck-defining synergy line
An Offer You Can't Refuse â‡„ various mana sinks (rampâ†’sink) â€” it's interaction/counterspell making one Treasure, not a ramp engine
fn: Overrun/anthem combat finish is under-modeled: Sphere Grid (is-overrun) and Lulu/Wakka as the actual kill condition are mostly bucketed as generic 'combat-enabler', missing that this is the deck's win line

Explore (Path of Discovery) as a +1/+1 counter source is captured only via 'explore'/'graveyard' tags, not tied into the counters family as an enabler

No distinction between 'counters placed' doublers and 'static counter modifier' (Hardened Scales) vs 'copy creature' (Altered Ego) â€” all collapsed into counter-multiplier
rampâ†’sink fires too readily for any rock + any mana-using ability, generating low-signal weak edges that pad pctInteractive

rawEvals.name: Raining Cats and Dogs (Secret Lair Commander 2024 Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Naya Cats-and-Dogs go-wide creature tribal. Despite Marisi being listed as commander, the real engine is Rin and Seri, Inseparable, which spits out Cat and Dog tokens and rewards tribal count. The deck floods the board with tokens (Regal Caracal, Brimaz, Nacatl War-Pride, Felidar Retreat, White Sun's Zenith, Jinnie Fay), multiplies them (Anointed Procession), buffs with tribal lords and anthems (Feline Sovereign, Pack Leader, King of the Pride, Beastmaster Ascension), and closes via overrun/combat finishers (Jetmir, Mirror Entity, Return of the Wildspeaker, Nacatl War-Pride, Skyhunter Strike Force). Marisi + Kitt Kanto + Komainu Battle Armor layer a goad/political combat angle on top.
fp: Pack Leader â‡„ Greater Tanuki / Spirited Companion / Komainu Battle Armor flagged lordâ†’tribe â€” Pack Leader only buffs Dogs and these are not reliably Dogs (Spirited Companion is a Fox/Dog enchantment-creature, Komainu is an Equipment-creature), the wiring ignores actual creature types
Skyhunter Strike Force treated as a tribal lord (is-lord) and wired lordâ†’tribe to ~everything â€” it is an attack-trigger pumper, not a tribal lord, so all its lordâ†’tribe edges are mislabeled
Feline Sovereign / King of the Pride (Cat-only lords) connected via lordâ†’tribe to non-Cat Dogs/bodies like Loyal Warhound's cluster and Greater Tanuki â€” off-tribe lord edges that confer no buff
Beastmaster Ascension flagged as is-lord and given many lordâ†’tribe edges â€” it is a global attack-pump enchantment, not a creature-type lord; those should be go-wide/combat edges, not lordâ†’tribe
Realmwalker â‡„ Vanquisher's Banner / Showdown of the Skalds 'cast' edges are noise â€” Realmwalker casts off the top by chosen type, it does not meaningfully combo with these draw-on-cast pieces
fn: Skullclamp + the token swarm (Rin and Seri, Regal Caracal, Brimaz, Nacatl War-Pride, Jinnie Fay) â€” equipping 1-toughness tokens to draw 2 is a premier card-advantage engine in this deck and Skullclamp is a zero-degree island; no sac-fodderâ†’draw-outlet family fired
Basilisk Collar (deathtouch + lifelink equipment) â€” relevant on goad-attacking creatures and Marisi's combat plan, left as an island with no equipâ†’combat synergy
Tocasia's Welcome and Cast Out as ETB-token / draw payoffs â€” in a token-spewing deck Tocasia's Welcome draws on every token entering; the taxonomy has no 'token-entersâ†’draw' payoff so it islanded

Maskwood Nexus / Realmwalker changeling-type-granting interaction with the tribal lords (everything becomes every creature type, turning partial lords into full lords) â€” a real type-matters synergy with no event

Goad-as-removal-deterrent political plan (Marisi, Kitt Kanto, Komainu Battle Armor forcing opponents to swing at each other) is only weakly represented; the deck's actual win-via-politics line is under-captured beyond raw combat-enabler counts
issues: lordâ†’tribe family does not check creature subtypes â€” it connects every lord to every body, inflating edge count to 183 and over-weighting cohesion; needs tribe-aware gating (Cat lord â†” Cats only, Dog lord â†” Dogs only)
is-lord capability is conflated with attack/combat anthems (Beastmaster Ascension, Skyhunter Strike Force, Jetmir tagged is-lord) â€” global pump effects are being misclassified as tribal lords
No sac-fodderâ†’draw-outlet (Skullclamp) family / event, so the single most important card-advantage engine in a token deck is invisible and islanded
No 'permanent-entersâ†’payoff' draw event (Tocasia's Welcome, Cast Out, Vanquisher's Banner only partly), so passive go-wide card draw is under-counted
No changeling / type-granting event (Maskwood Nexus, Realmwalker) to recognize that all-types-matter cards turn narrow lords into universal lords
Equipment-as-combat-enabler (Basilisk Collar, Komainu Battle Armor partly) has no equipâ†’creature/combat family, leaving equipment islanded

rawEvals.name: Eldrazi Incursion (Modern Horizons 3 Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Colorless/5C Eldrazi ramp-and-spawn midrange. It generates a swarm of 0/1 Eldrazi Scion/Spawn tokens (Awakening Zone, Skittering Invasion, Sifter of Skulls, Vile Redeemer, Spawnbed Protector, Chittering Dispatcher, Drowner of Hope) that double as ramp (sacrifice for mana) and as go-wide bodies, then dumps that mana into huge colorless Eldrazi (Ulamog's Crusher, Artisan of Kozilek, World Breaker, Oblivion Sower) and into the commander Ulalek, whose {C}{C}{C}{C}{C} ability copies the triggered abilities of your colorless spells/permanents. Wins by going wide + Eldrazi Monument/Garruk's Uprising/Return of the Wildspeaker overrun, by big-Eldrazi beatdown, or by snowballing trigger-doubling value.
fp: Sol Ring â‡„ Suffer the Past / Ugin's Insight / Azlask (rampâ†’sink) â€” a generic mana rock feeding a life-drain instant or a card-draw spell is not a real synergy line; it's just 'you have mana, you can pay for things.' This pattern repeats ~198 times and is the bulk of the graph.

Arcane Signet / Talisman cycle â‡„ Azlask, the Swelling Scourge (rampâ†’sink) â€” Azlask's mana sink is incidental; treating all five Talismans + every rock as a cohesive engine with it is noise, not intent.
Twins of Discord â‡„ Ulamog's Crusher / Bismuth Mindrender (attack) â€” these are unrelated attackers; no real synergy beyond 'both attack.'
Ugin, the Ineffable â‡„ Eldrazi Monument / Azlask (destroy) â€” these share a 'destroy' tag but do not actually combine into anything; spurious edge.
fn: Ulalek, Fused Atrocity's core ability â€” paying {C}{C}{C}{C}{C} to COPY the triggered abilities of your colorless spells and permanents this turn. This is the entire reason the deck exists and the taxonomy has no event for 'copy/double triggered abilities,' so it shows up only as a weak generic 'cast' edge (deg 4).

Spawn/Scion-token-as-ramp loop: producers like Awakening Zone, Sifter of Skulls, Vile Redeemer, Spawnbed Protector, Chittering Dispatcher, Drowner of Hope make tokens that sacrifice for mana â€” a sac-fodderâ†’outlet/ramp engine. The model tags them 'is-ramp' and 'tokens' separately but never draws the fodderâ†’mana-outlet edge that defines the deck.

Colorless cost-reduction enablers â€” Morophon, Mutated Cultist, Herald's Horn, Ugin the Ineffable all reduce Eldrazi/colorless costs to enable the big-mana plan; this cost-reductionâ†’cast-payoff synergy is essentially uncaptured (Morophon/Mutated Cultist sit at deg 2).

Devoid/'Eldrazi tribal' as a real kindred web: Forsaken Monument and Eldrazi Monument anchor a tribe, but the colorless-matters payoffs (Forsaken Monument doubling colorless mana, Ugin) form a colorless-payoff family the taxonomy doesn't represent.
issues: No event/family for 'copy or double a triggered ability' â€” the defining commander mechanic (Ulalek) is invisible, collapsed into generic 'cast'. This is the single biggest gap for this deck.

rampâ†’sink is wildly over-weighted: 198 of 358 edges come from fully connecting every mana source to a handful of sinks (Suffer the Past, Ugin's Insight, Azlask). This both inflates and DISTORTS cohesion measurement, yet the deck still scored low â€” meaning real engines are under-credited while filler dominates the count.
No sac-fodderâ†’mana-outlet family for token-ramp; Eldrazi Spawn/Scion 'sac for mana' is a textbook fodderâ†’outlet loop left unmodeled.
No cost-reductionâ†’payoff family despite four reducers in the deck.

islandCards include genuine role players that interact thematically (All Is Dust and Kozilek's Return are colorless board wipes that pair with Ulalek/colorless theme; Ancient Stirrings digs for colorless cards; Rishkar's Expertise / Idol of Oblivion are card-advantage payoffs for the big-creature / go-wide plan) â€” flagging them as zero-interaction islands understates cohesion.

hasCombo=false is technically correct (no hard combo), but the deck has a strong, coherent engine that the score (32, 'Loosely connected') undersells; the low score is driven by the model's blindness to the commander engine plus the rampâ†’sink noise.

rawEvals.name: Tyranid Swarm (Warhammer 40,000 Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Simic (GU) Tyranid tribal +1/+1 counters go-wide. The deck floods the board with Tyranid creatures that "enter with a +1/+1 counter," multiplies those counters with adders/doublers (Hardened Scales, The First Tyrannic War, Biophagus), pays off both raw counter count and creature count (Inspiring Call, tribal lords, counter-based mana sinks), and wins by swarming with overrun/evasion (Old One Eye, Winged Hive Tyrant, Bone Sabres). It is a synergistic midrange/battlecruiser precon, NOT a combo deck.
fp: Hierophant Bio-Titan â‡„ ~17 creatures (family 'counters', s1) â€” Hierophant is a cost-reducer/big body that CONSUMES counters; it does not place counters on these creatures, so the generic 'counters' co-membership edges are not real synergies
Genestealer Patriarch â‡„ Ravener / New Horizons â‡„ Genestealer Patriarch (copyâ†’trigger) â€” Patriarch makes Genestealer tokens, it is not a trigger-doubler; this is a mislabeled enablement edge
Magus Lucea Kane â‡„ New Horizons / Ravener (copyâ†’trigger) â€” Magus copies the FIRST instance of a noncreature spell's effect; pairing it with ETB-counter creatures as 'copyâ†’trigger' is spurious

Inspiring Call â‡„ Ghyrson Starn / Atalan Jackal / Venomthrope / Gargoyle Flock etc. (tribal-countâ†’payoff s2) â€” Inspiring Call cares about counters on creatures; counterless vanilla/utility bodies inflate this hub without a real interaction

Starstorm â‡„ Magus/Nexos/Biophagus (rampâ†’sink) â€” Starstorm is a board-wipe X-spell sink, but tagging mana dorks as its 'ramp' partner double-counts the same generic manaâ†’X relationship across many edges
fn: Icon of Ancestry â€” flagged as an island, but it is a real Tyranid tribal anthem (+1/+1 to the tribe) AND a tap-to-tutor-a-creature engine; the taxonomy has no 'tribal anthem' / static lord-buff event for noncreature permanents

Shadow in the Warp â€” flagged as an island; it is Tyranid cost-reduction that meaningfully accelerates the creature-flood gameplan, but there is no 'tribal cost-reduction â†’ deploy more creatures' family
Herald's Horn â€” its tribal cost reduction + top-of-deck reveal for Tyranids is only weakly captured (deg 4 via scry); its main job as a tribal payoff/cast-enabler is largely missed

Token-driven go-wide payoff loop is underweighted: Tervigon/Termagant Swarm/Old One Eye/Tyranid Invasion/Lictor produce bodies that feed counter-doublers and Inspiring Call's width count, but token-production â†’ counter/tribal-payoff is not modeled as a distinct family (only 3 go-wideâ†’payoff edges)
issues: No 'tribal anthem' / static-lord-buff event for noncreature permanents â€” strands Icon of Ancestry and undercounts true tribal cohesion
No 'tribal cost-reduction â†’ cast creatures' family â€” strands Shadow in the Warp and Herald's Horn's primary function

Generic 'counters' co-membership family over-fires: any creature with a counter gets edged to any other counter-haver regardless of whether one actually feeds the other, inflating avgDeg (11.66) and hub degrees

Hub over-fanning: Inspiring Call (41), The First Tyrannic War (46), Old One Eye (40), Tyranid Prime (40), Biophagus (35) drive largestWebShare to 87% and avgDeg high; raw degree rewards 'connects to everything' cards more than tightly-coupled engine pieces
copyâ†’trigger gate is too loose â€” token-makers (Genestealer Patriarch) and spell-copiers (Magus) are conflated with true trigger-doublers

rawEvals.name: Dance of the Elements (Lorwyn Eclipsed Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Naya (RGW) Elemental tribal â€” a go-wide / ETB-value midrange deck built around Ashling, the Limitless copying Elemental spells. It floods the board with Elementals carrying strong ETBs (Mulldrifter, Shriekmaw, Risen Reef, Avenger of Zendikar, Cavalier of Thorns, Titan of Industry, plus the Lorwyn evoke/Eclipse creatures), leverages tribal-count payoffs (Omnath Locus of the Roil, Vernal Sovereign, Elemental Spectacle, Kindred Summons) and lords (Incandescent Soulstoke), ramps hard, and wins by copying big Elemental ETBs and attacking wide with an overrun-style payoff (Garruk's Uprising, Return of the Wildspeaker, Jubilation).
fp: copyâ†’trigger flagged between every pair of Elemental ETB creatures (e.g. Ingot Chewer â‡„ Shriekmaw, Mulldrifter â‡„ Endurance) â€” these do not interact with each other; both merely get copied independently by Ashling. The edge belongs to Ashlingâ†”X, not Xâ†”Y.

tribal-countâ†’payoff drawn as a near-complete clique among all Elementals (e.g. Slithermuse â‡„ Realmwalker, Muldrotha â‡„ Foundation Breaker) â€” being two members of the same tribe is not a pairwise synergy; only the payoffâ†”member edges are real.

rampâ†’sink edges treating every mana rock as synergizing with every mana-sink creature (Sol Ring â‡„ Shimmercreep, Fellwar Stone â‡„ Flamebraider) â€” generic ramp into generic sink is filler, not a designed synergy.
lordâ†’tribe edge Faeburrow Elder â‡„ Incandescent Soulstoke â€” Faeburrow Elder is not an Elemental, so Soulstoke does not buff/cheat it; the tribal link is spurious.

go-wideâ†’payoff Return of the Wildspeaker â‡„ Mass of Mysteries â€” Mass of Mysteries makes copies of itself but is not a reliable wide board the instant resolves; weak-to-nonexistent pairing flagged at strength 3.
fn: ETB-value chain / cast-trigger engine: Risen Reef and Omnath, Locus of the Roil draw/ramp off every Elemental ETB and off landfall, creating the deck's real snowball engine â€” captured only piecemeal as generic tribal-count, not as an ETB-cascade or 'elemental-entersâ†’payoff' family.

Evoke / sacrifice-fodder interactions: the Lorwyn evoke creatures (Ingot Chewer, Shriekmaw, Mulldrifter) and the Eclipse leave-the-battlefield creatures (Belonging, Impulsivity, Jubilation, Lamentation, Subterfuge with 'leaves' producers) have a self-sacrifice/recursion subtheme with Muldrotha/Greenwarden/Endurance/Haunting Voyage that is barely represented.
Landfall package (Cavalier of Thorns, Avenger of Zendikar, Omnath Locus of Rage, ramp-to-extra-lands) only registers 3 landfall edges despite being a real sub-engine.
Ashling's actual token/X-spell payoff identity â€” its copy ability scaling off mana and Elemental count â€” is reduced to flat strength-2 copy edges with no combo/scaling recognition.
issues: Clique inflation: copyâ†’trigger and tribal-countâ†’payoff each form near-complete graphs over the tribe, so edges (467) and avgDeg (14.2) overstate true pairwise synergy density; weightedAvgDeg (6.82) is the more honest signal.

copyâ†’trigger is mis-attributed pairwise: when a single hub (Ashling) copies many targets, the model draws memberâ†”member edges instead of hubâ†”member only, double-counting the hub's value across the tribe.
tribal-countâ†’payoff has no payoff-vs-member distinction â€” it links members to members, not just members to payoffs, manufacturing synergy among vanilla tribe filler.
rampâ†’sink fires on generic ramp + generic mana-sink with no threshold for whether the sink is a real payoff, inflating a midrange manabase into apparent synergy.
No 'ETB-on-creature-enter' / cast-trigger family to represent Risen Reef and Omnath Roil, the deck's signature value engine.
islandCards correctly flags pure interchangeable filler (Cultivate, Kodama's Reach, Path to Exile, Blasphemous Act, Crib Swap, Reality Shift) â€” this part is accurate and useful.

rawEvals.name: Blood Rites  (The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Orzhov (W/B) Vampire-tribal aristocrats. It overlaps three win-paths that all run through creatures dying: (1) go-wide vampire tokens with anthem lords (Legion Lieutenant, Order of Sacred Dusk, Sorin) plus combat/attack payoffs (Mavren Fein, Sanctum Seeker, ClavileĂ±o); (2) sacrifice engines (Viscera Seer, Yahenni, Indulgent Aristocrat, Bartolome, Etchings, Master of Dark Rites) feeding death-triggered drain payoffs (Blood Artist, Falkenrath Noble, Cruel Celebrant, Sanctum Seeker); (3) the commander's own engine â€” Clavileno taps + sacrifices a creature to make a 1/1 lifelink Vampire Demon, recursively converting any creature into vampires and fueling drain. It grinds and drains opponents out rather than comboing, though it contains a true infinite-drain combo line.
fp: rampâ†’sink edges like Arcane Signet â‡„ Olivia's Wrath / Pact of the Serpent â€” a generic mana rock paired with a one-shot X-spell is not a real deck synergy, just 'rock makes mana, spell costs mana'; these inflate the rampâ†’sink count (94).
Sol Ring / Orzhov Signet / Talisman â‡„ Order of Sacred Dusk as 'rampâ†’sink' â€” Order's mana sink is incidental; this is generic ramp, not a built-around line.

ClavileĂ±o â‡„ March of the Canonized / Charismatic Conqueror tagged 'combatâ†’payoff' â€” these are token-makers, not attack-trigger payoffs that pair meaningfully with the commander; the edge is a weak co-occurrence, not a synergy.

Promise of Aclazotz â‡„ Dusk Legion Zealot / Champion of Dusk as 'copyâ†’trigger' (strength 2) overstates it â€” Promise reanimates one creature with a copy clause, it is not a repeatable copy engine with those ETB-draw bodies.
fn: Exquisite Blood + Sanctum Seeker (also + Cruel Celebrant / Sorin's emblem / any symmetric drain): the canonical infinite life-loss combo â€” opponent loses life â†’ Exquisite Blood gains you life â†’ drainer triggers on the life change â†’ loop. The taxonomy has no 'lifegain-on-lifeloss â‡„ lifeloss-on-lifegain' mirror-drain combo family, so hasCombo stays false and no comboCriticalPair is flagged. This is the single biggest miss.

ClavileĂ±o's signature engine: tap + sacrifice a creature to create a Vampire token, which itself can be sacrificed â€” a recursive sacâ†’tokenâ†’sac/drain loop with a sac outlet and Blood Artist. The classifier has no 'token-from-sacrifice recurses into sac-fodder' notion, so the commander's defining mechanic is scattered across generic edges.

Bloodghast + Wayfarer's Bauble / fetch-style landfall recursion as a free sac-fodder loop (Bloodghast returns on landfall to be re-sacrificed) is only caught as a single weak 'landfall' edge, missing the repeatable-fodder engine.

Vampire token-doubling / attack-trigger token snowball (Mavren Fein, Charismatic Conqueror, ClavileĂ±o all making tokens that then trigger lords and drain) is not modeled as a go-wide token engine family.
issues: No combo family for symmetric life-swing loops (lifegain-triggers-on-opponent-lifeloss â‡„ drain-on-lifegain), so the Exquisite Blood infinite combo is invisible â€” hasCombo:false is wrong for this deck.
rampâ†’sink family appears over-weighted: it links every mana rock to every mana-sink/X-spell, producing 94 edges that overstate intentional synergy versus generic ramp.
Recursive 'sacrifice produces a token that is itself sac-fodder' (ClavileĂ±o, Elenda, Promise) is not represented, undercounting the commander's core engine.

combo gate is too strict / detached from the lifegain+lifeloss tags it already assigns to Exquisite Blood, Sanctum Seeker, and Cruel Celebrant â€” those exact event tags should have been enough to flag a combo-critical pair but produced only weak strength-1 edges.

rawEvals.name: Draconic Destruction (Starter Commander  Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Gruul (R/G) Dragon tribal big-mana midrange/beatdown. Atarka, World Render gives all attacking Dragons double strike, so the deck ramps hard, deploys fat Dragons, pumps them with Crucible of Fire, and swings for lethal double-strike damage. Secondary engines: Dragon-ETB / cast-a-Dragon payoffs that draw cards (Garruk's Uprising, Elemental Bond, Dragon's Hoard) and deal direct damage (Scourge of Valkas, Dragon Tempest), plus an X-spell / mana-sink removal suite (Chain Reaction, Clan Defiance, Flameblast/Hoard-Smelter/Steel Hellkite). It is a fair tribal aggro-midrange deck with no combo.
fp: Dragonkin Berserker tribal-count->payoff â‡„ Sakura-Tribe Elder / Loaming Shaman / Draconic Disciple â€” these are NOT Dragons, so they do not feed Dragonkin Berserker's Dragon-count trigger; the star burst from Berserker (deg 30) connecting to nearly every creature overcounts tribal synergy
Crucible of Fire lord->tribe â‡„ Sakura-Tribe Elder / Loaming Shaman / Drumhunter â€” Crucible only buffs Dragons; these non-Dragon creatures get nothing, so those lord->tribe edges are false

ramp->sink generic edges like Sol Ring/Arcane Signet/Talisman of Impulse â‡„ Chain Reaction/Magmaquake â€” every mana rock paired with every X-spell is a trivial 'mana helps spells' link, not a deck-specific synergy; treating 99 such pairs as interactions vastly overstates cohesion

Beast Within / Return to Nature / Vandalblast â‡„ Sarkhan, the Dragonspeaker under 'destroy' â€” these are independent removal spells with no real interaction with Sarkhan; co-membership in a 'destroy' family is spurious
fn: Atarka, World Render's double-strike-on-attack for Dragons â€” the deck's primary win condition and the reason every Dragon is included â€” has no event/family; the commander sits at deg 3 with empty produces/consumes

Dragon-ETB direct-damage engine: Scourge of Valkas ('whenever a Dragon enters, deal damage = its power') and Dragon Tempest ('whenever a Dragon enters, deal damage equal to number of Dragons') are a genuine go-wide-Dragons -> burn payoff that is modeled only as generic ramp->sink, missing the etb-triggered-damage-per-Dragon synergy

'Whenever a creature/Dragon with power 4+ enters, draw' payoffs â€” Garruk's Uprising and Elemental Bond turn every fat Dragon into card draw; Elemental Bond is left as a deg-0 island despite being a core engine, indicating no etb->draw family fired

Treasure/token sub-theme: Rapacious Dragon and Draconic Disciple make tokens/Treasure that feed the X-spell mana sinks and tribal count, but the token-producer -> sink/payoff line is not coherently captured
issues: No taxonomy event for 'attacking-creature gains evasion/double-strike' (commander's core ability), so build-around commanders that define the win condition register as near-islands
tribal-count->payoff and lord->tribe do not verify creature subtype â€” they link to non-Dragons (Sakura-Tribe Elder, Loaming Shaman), producing false tribal edges and inflating hub degree
ramp->sink family is far too eager: pairing every mana source with every X/activated-cost spell generates ~99 low-value edges that dominate familyBreakdown and skew avgDeg/largestWebShare upward

Missing an 'ETB-triggered payoff per matching permanent' family (Scourge of Valkas, Dragon Tempest, Garruk's Uprising, Elemental Bond), so the deck's real recurring engine is invisible while generic ramp dominates
Island detection mislabels real engine pieces (Elemental Bond, Fires of Yavimaya as a haste/trample enabler) as zero-interaction because their enabling effects lack events

rawEvals.name: Forces of the Imperium (Warhammer 40,000 Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: WUB (Esper) go-wide tokens / aristocrats midrange. The deck floods the board with Human/Imperium creature tokens (Martial Coup, Deploy to the Front, Defenders of Humanity, Entrapment Maneuver, Marneus Calgar's squad tokens) and then either overruns with For the Emperor! / combat-payoff anthems, or grinds value through a sacrifice-and-drain engine: Commissar Severina Raine and The Golden Throne turn the wide board into card draw, life loss, and ramp. Greyfax provides a detain/tax + token-and-draw value engine. It is a fair, board-centric value deck with no real combo line.
fp: ramp->sink edges from every mana rock (Sol Ring, Arcane Signet, all 3 Talismans, Mind Stone, Everflowing Chalice, Commander's Sphere) to every X-cost spell (Hour of Reckoning, Martial Coup, Deploy to the Front, Defenders of Humanity, Epistolary Librarian, Redemptor Dreadnought): this is generic 'mana enables expensive cards', true of any ramp deck, not a real synergy line â€” 89 edge-instances grossly overweight it.

Mind Stone / Commander's Sphere flagged with 'draw' produce-event but their ramp->sink edges are counted as if they matter to X-spells the same as Sol Ring â€” redundant duplication inflating the largest web.

The Golden Throne <-> nearly every creature as 'sac-fodder->outlet' (77 instances): Golden Throne sacrifices a creature for mana, but it is a one-shot-per-turn ramp piece, not an aristocrats engine â€” flagging it as a sac outlet paired with all 30 bodies vastly overstates a real fodder-to-outlet relationship.

lord->tribe edges from Bastion Protector to non-legendary creatures: Bastion Protector ONLY buffs Legendary creatures, so edges to Space Marine Scout, Vexilus Praetor, Sister of Silence, Assault Intercessor, Primaris Eliminator etc. (which are not legendary) are false â€” the lord predicate is too coarse.

Greyfax tagged 'is-lord' and given lord->tribe edges to all 31 creatures: Inquisitor Greyfax is not a tribal lord (she detains/taps and makes a token), so 30+ of those lord->tribe edges are fabricated.

Mortify / Collective Effort / And They Shall Know No Fear flagged as 'destroy' synergy partners with creatures like Bastion Protector, Primaris Chaplain, Arco-Flagellant: targeted removal is not a synergy WITH your own creatures â€” these 'destroy'-family edges between unrelated cards are noise.
fn: Lifeloss/drain payoff: Commissar Severina Raine drains each opponent when a Human/Astartes dies, and the deck is full of expendable tokens â€” the true aristocrats win/grind line is a sacrifice->lifeloss drain engine, but the classifier only tags Raine's lifeloss as an isolated produce-event and builds no 'sacrifice->lifeloss payoff' family.

Token-doubling / squad / amass-style mass token generation as a distinct go-wide ENABLER is under-modeled: Marneus Calgar's squad and the en-masse token makers feeding Severina Raine and For the Emperor! is the core engine, yet it is scattered across generic 'tokens' (19) and 'go-wide->payoff' (28) rather than recognized as the deck's defining loop.

Detain / tap-down (Greyfax) and 'tap target permanent' as a tempo/control axis has no event in the taxonomy â€” Greyfax's repeatable detain and the Sister of Silence / tax effects are real interactive lines that go entirely unmodeled.

Lifegain payoff loop: multiple lifegain sources (Sanguinary Priest, Celestine, Triumph of Saint Katherine, Sister Repentia, For the Emperor!) with Celestine's life-triggered token recursion is a minor subtheme the classifier ignores â€” lifegain is only listed as a produce-event with no consumer.

Reanimation/graveyard recursion (Celestine, Sister Hospitaller, Redemptor Dreadnought consuming graveyard) is present but not knit into any graveyard-value family â€” these sit as isolated consume-events.
issues: lord->tribe predicate is far too loose: it does not check the lord's actual buff condition (legendary-only for Bastion Protector) or whether the 'lord' is really a lord at all (Greyfax mislabeled is-lord), producing 87 mostly-fake edges and inflating the largest-web share.

ramp->sink is a near-universal family that fires for any rock x any X-spell; in a deck with 8 rocks and 6 X-spells it generates ~89 edges of essentially zero discriminating value â€” it should be down-weighted or gated to dedicated mana-sink payoffs.

sac-fodder->outlet conflates a once-per-turn ramp sacrifice (Golden Throne) with a true repeatable aristocrats outlet; no distinction between 'sac for mana' and 'sac for drain/value', and it pairs the outlet with all 30 bodies regardless.
No 'sacrifice->lifeloss/drain payoff' family exists, so the deck's actual aristocrats win condition (Severina Raine) is invisible as an engine.
No detain/tap-down/tax interactive family â€” Greyfax's signature mechanic and the deck's control axis have no representation.

'destroy' family appears to fire between any destroy-source and any creature, treating one-sided removal as mutual synergy; it should not create edges between a player's own removal spell and that player's creatures.

Edge count (390) and weightedAvgDeg are dominated by three spray families (lord->tribe, ramp->sink, sac-fodder->outlet = 253 of the instances), so the cohesion metric rewards redundant breadth over genuine engine depth.

rawEvals.name: Fae Dominion (Wilds of Eldraine Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Dimir (UB) Faerie tribal â€” a go-wide, evasive flyers aggro/tempo deck built around Tegwyll, Duke of Splendor. It accrues a board of small flying Faeries, pumps them with anthems (Scion of Oona, Glen Elendra Liege), grinds value via flash/ETB faeries and a spellslinger-lite shell (counterspells, cantrips, bounce), and wins through evasive aristocrat-ish chip damage plus death-trigger drain (Tegwyll, Faerie Bladecrafter). Secondary engine: copy/flicker payoffs (Archmage of Echoes, Theoretical Duplication, Reflections of Littjara) doubling Faerie ETBs.
fp: Spell Stutter â‡„ (every creature) â€” flagged as 27 strength-2 tribal-countâ†’payoff edges, but Spell Stutter is just a Faerie-count Mana Leak; its 'synergy' with each individual faerie is incidental, massively inflating its degree (31) and the tribal-countâ†’payoff family (31 instances)

Faerie Bladecrafter â‡„ Sol Ring / Arcane Signet / Dimir Signet / Fellwar Stone / Mind Stone / Talisman / Midnight Clock â€” rampâ†’sink: Bladecrafter's only mana sink is a fixed-cost activated ability, not an open-ended mana dump, so generic rocks are not a meaningful 'sink' synergy
Halo Forager â‡„ every mana rock â€” rampâ†’sink treated as synergy, but Forager's flashback cost being payable from rocks is generic mana, not a deck synergy

Reality Shift â‡„ Nightmare Unmaking â€” millâ†’graveyard-payoff: Reality Shift exiles one creature (manifest), it is not a mill enabler for Nightmare Unmaking's graveyard-size payoff; coincidental tag overlap
fn: Flying / evasion as the primary win axis â€” the entire faerie board flies and the anthems (Scion of Oona, Glen Elendra Liege) turn that into lethal evasive damage; there is no evasion or anthem-wincon family so the deck's actual kill plan is invisible

Flash / instant-speed tempo â€” Cloud of Faeries, Brazen Borrower, Quickling, Spellscorn Coven, Glen Elendra Archmage and the counter/bounce suite define how this deck plays at instant speed; no flash-matters family exists

Goad / forced-attack political engine â€” Alela goads, Nettling Nuisance goads, and Reconnaissance Mission/combat payoffs reward attacks; goad shows only 1 edge, badly under-counting this Dimir political subtheme

Token-go-wide payoffs â€” Alela, Shadow Puppeteers, Tegwyll's Scouring, Oona make faerie tokens that feed the anthem/lord count and deathâ†’drain, but a tokensâ†’anthem/aristocrat payoff family is not represented
issues: tribal-countâ†’payoff over-fires: a single count-based card (Spell Stutter) gets an edge to every tribe member, inflating its degree and the family's instance count without representing a real build-around engine
No flying/evasion family â€” for tribal go-wide flyers decks the actual wincon is unmodeled
No flash/instant-speed-matters family despite it being a core faerie identity
goad/political family appears under-weighted (1 edge) given multiple goad sources and combat payoffs
rampâ†’sink fires on fixed-cost activated abilities (Faerie Bladecrafter) and flashback (Halo Forager), generating low-value generic-mana edges
millâ†’graveyard-payoff misfires on an exile-based removal spell (Reality Shift)

rawEvals.name: Abzan Armor (Tarkir Dragonstorm Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Defender/Walls toughness-matters tribal midrange. The deck plays a critical mass of high-toughness Walls/Defenders that ramp (Overgrown Battlement, Axebane Guardian, Arbor Adherent, Wall of Roots, Sylvan Caryatid, Faeburrow Elder) into a "deal/assign combat damage equal to toughness" go-tall/go-wide attack via Assault Formation, Behind the Scenes, Wakestone Gargoyle, Tower Defense. A secondary axis is +1/+1 counters and life-total payoffs (Wall of Limbs, Betor, Towering Titan, Indulging Patrician, Blight Pile, Staff of Compleation proliferate). Felothar the Steadfast acts as a counters/attack-trigger commander rather than a true sacrifice engine. It wins by swinging with abnormally-tough defenders, draining via Blight Pile/Indulging Patrician, or beating down post-Towering-Titan anthem.
fp: Felothar the Steadfast â‡„ ~38 creatures (sac-fodderâ†’outlet) â€” Felothar is not a repeatable sacrifice outlet for fodder; its ability sacrifices for counters under conditions, so treating every creature as sac fodder for it generates ~38 phantom edges and dominates the graph

Towering Titan â‡„ nearly every creature (sac-fodderâ†’outlet) â€” Towering Titan's sacrifice is a single-use anthem/finisher, not a recurring outlet that wants a sac-fodder package; these are not a real aristocrats synergy
Behind the Scenes â‡„ all creatures (lordâ†’tribe) â€” Behind the Scenes is a toughness/menace combat enabler granting menace, not a creature-type lord pumping a tribe; family mislabeled
Betor â‡„ Shalai / Protector of the Wastes (lordâ†’tribe) â€” these are counters/utility pieces, not lordâ†”tribe relationships
Arcane Signet/Sol Ring â‡„ Tip the Scales (rampâ†’sink) â€” Tip the Scales is a one-shot wrath/sacrifice spell, not a mana sink that scales with ramp
fn: Toughness-matters / 'assign combat damage equal to toughness' payoff â€” Assault Formation, Behind the Scenes, Wakestone Gargoyle, Tower Defense convert the deck's high toughness into damage; this is the actual win condition and has NO event/family in the taxonomy

Defender-tribal payoffs keyed off the Wall count â€” Overgrown Battlement and Axebane Guardian tap for mana per Defender, Wingmantle Chaplain/Rampart Architect care about Walls; the model partly catches this as tribal-countâ†’payoff but never recognizes 'Defender' as the tribe

Life-total-as-resource engine â€” Wall of Limbs gets counters equal to life gained, Betor and Indulging Patrician/Blight Pile/Rhox Faithmender scale with life; the lifegain family (only 6 edges) drastically undercounts this and misses the lifeâ†’counter conversion on Wall of Limbs
Felothar's actual ability (counter doubling / attack-trigger payoff) â€” the commander's real function as a counters/attack payoff is never modeled; it is reduced to a bogus sac outlet
issues: No taxonomy event for toughness-matters / defends-as-attacker (toughnessâ†’power), which is the entire deck's identity â€” major coverage gap for Arcades/Doran/Felothar-style decks

sac-fodderâ†’outlet family is wildly over-triggered: any creature with an 'is-sac-outlet' or one-shot sacrifice cap gets star-wired to the whole board, manufacturing 80 edges and over-inflating cohesion
lordâ†’tribe fires on non-tribal anthems/enablers (Behind the Scenes, Shalai) â€” needs to distinguish true creature-type lords from combat/toughness enablers
'Defender' is not recognized as a tribe, so tribal-countâ†’payoff lands on Overgrown Battlement generically rather than identifying the defender package
Felothar's commander cap mislabeled as is-sac-outlet, cascading the largest false-positive cluster from the single highest-degree node

rawEvals.name: Mind Flayarrrs (Battle for Baldur's Gate Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Dimir (UB) mill / "stealth-and-steal" midrange built around Captain N'ghathrod. The plan: attack with Horrors to mill opponents, then steal the milled cards (N'ghathrod) and convert fat opponent graveyards into damage/board via graveyard-size payoffs (Consuming Aberration, Guiltfeeder, Sewer Nemesis, Nighthowler, Drown in the Loch, Psychosis Crawler). It's a value/grind deck â€” wins by going wide with milled creatures plus oversized graveyard-payoff beaters, not by a combo.
fp: Aboleth Spawn â‡„ Phyrexian Rager / Ravenous Chupacabra / Sludge Monster / Hunted Horror (copyâ†’trigger): Aboleth Spawn copies an opponent's spell, it does not reliably copy your own ETB creatures â€” these are not real synergies, just a copier being wired to every body

Uchuulon â‡„ Dark Hatchling / Dusk Mangler / Phyrexian Rager etc (copyâ†’trigger): Uchuulon makes a Slime COPY of a creature dying, narrow and situational, not a deckbuilding synergy with each ETB creature
Endless Evil â‡„ the same ETB-creature cluster (copyâ†’trigger): it copies ONE target on resolution; flagging it against 7+ creatures inflates the web
Psionic Ritual â‡„ Woe Strider / Phyrexian Rager / Ravenous Chupacabra (copyâ†’trigger): Psionic Ritual copies a spell, not these resolved permanents â€” mislabeled

Reflections of Littjara â‡„ Ravenous Chupacabra / Sludge Monster / Dark Hatchling (copyâ†’trigger): only triggers on the SECOND of a creature TYPE; treating it as a generic ETB-copy doubler overstates it

rampâ†’sink edges from every mana rock (Sol Ring, Arcane/Dimir Signet, Talisman, Keyrune) to Nighthowler/Chasm Skulker: Nighthowler/Chasm Skulker are not X-cost mana sinks for leftover mana, so these are weak/spurious
fn: The deck's central THEFT engine: N'ghathrod and Mind Flayer steal opponents' creatures/milled cards, and Extract from Darkness reanimates from ANY graveyard â€” no 'mill-opponentâ†’steal/cast-from-opponent-graveyard' family exists, so the deck's signature line is invisible

Horror tribal: N'ghathrod's mill triggers ONLY off attacking Horrors, and Herald's Horn names a creature type; the deck is built around the Horror creature type but there is no lordâ†’tribe / tribal-attack-trigger edge connecting the Horror bodies to N'ghathrod

Mindcrank as a recursive mill loop (Mindcrank mills equal to life lost, chaining with any lifeloss/mill) is only tagged as a single weak lifeloss edge to Psychosis Crawler â€” its engine potential is undercounted

Psychosis Crawler as a 'lose life when opponents draw'/draw-payoff is captured for your draw, but its alt-win pressure with mass card draw (Pull from Tomorrow, Forgotten Creation) as a damage finisher is undervalued
issues: copyâ†’trigger family has no gating on what a copier can actually target (own ETB vs opponent's spell vs creature-type), so a single copy card explodes into ~8-10 edges and becomes the deck's largest family despite being incidental â€” needs target/timing validation

No taxonomy event for stealing or casting from an OPPONENT's graveyard/library (theft), so the entire 'mill-as-a-resource-you-take' subtheme is unmodeled â€” a structural gap for Dimir mill-theft commanders
Tribal/type-matters triggers tied to a creature type (N'ghathrod's Horror-attack mill, Herald's Horn) are not connected as lordâ†’tribe edges
rampâ†’sink fires on any high-CMC or counter-using creature even when it is not an X-spell or activated mana sink, producing weak noise edges

rawEvals.name: Elven Council (The Lord of the Rings Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Bant (GWU) political "council's dilemma" / will-of-the-council voting deck built around Galadriel, Elven-Queen, with two supporting subthemes: (1) +1/+1 counters matters, multiplied by Arwen, Weaver of Hope; (2) a light Elf-tribal ramp base (Elvish Archdruid, mana dwarves/elves) feeding big mana-sinks. It wins by accruing card/board advantage through voting (Plea for Power, Sail into the West, Travel Through Caradhras), snowballing counters on Galadriel/Arwen/Legolas/Realm Seekers, ramping into Genesis Wave / Realm Seekers / token makers, then closing with an Overwhelming Stampede overrun or unblockable commander damage (Whispersilk Cloak / Lightning Greaves). It is a precon midrange "value goodstuff" deck, not a combo deck.
fp: Sol Ring â‡„ Overwhelming Stampede (rampâ†’sink): generic 'mana can pay for a spell' is not a real synergy â€” every ramp piece is mechanically linked to every X/expensive spell, vastly inflating the 56 rampâ†’sink instances

Sol Ring/Arcane Signet/Commander's Sphere â‡„ Inscription of Abundance / Galadhrim Ambush / Sylvan Offering (rampâ†’sink): same generic-mana over-linking; colorless rocks paying for green spells is filler, not a designed line

LothlĂłrien Blade â‡„ Lignify and Lignify â‡„ Lightning Greaves/Whispersilk Cloak (attach): grouping an Aura that shrinks a creature with equipment that buffs your own is a meaningless 'both attach to a creature' edge, no functional interaction
Beast Within â‡„ Heroic Intervention (destroy) and â‡„ Reclamation Sage: these are independent removal/protection cards, not a synergy pair â€” being in the same 'destroy' family is incidental
Mystic Confluence â‡„ Colossal Whale (leaves) and Song of EĂ¤rendil â‡„ Colossal Whale (leaves): a generic 'something leaves' tag, no actual recursion/blink loop exists here
fn: Galadriel, Elven-Queen's core engine is gifting +1/+1 counters to OTHER players' creatures each upkeep and drawing a card / tempting the Ring when counters are placed â€” the classifier has no event for 'counter-placement triggers draw/Ring', so her actual card-advantage motor is invisible despite being the commander's whole identity
The Ring / Ring-bearer mechanic (Galadriel produces and consumes 'theRing') has no synergy family â€” Ring-bearer tempting and its escalating bonuses are simply absent from the taxonomy

Unblockable / evasion commander-damage win line: Whispersilk Cloak and Lightning Greaves (haste + protection) on Galadriel are tagged only as inert 'attach' utility, missing the 'evasion enabler â†’ commander-damage payoff' synergy with a counters-laden Galadriel

Landfall payoff: multiple cards produce 'landfall' (Travel Through Caradhras, Realm Seekers, Farhaven Elf, Growth Spiral, Rampant Growth) but there is no landfallâ†’payoff family, so Realm Seekers growing off land drops and ramp-as-landfall is not connected

Reanimation/recursion: Mirkwood Elk consumes 'reanimate' and Learn from the Past/Seeds of Renewal are graveyard recursion, but the graveyard family only fires as a thin 'self-mill for Genesis Wave' tag and misses the small reanimate package
issues: No event for counter-placement-as-trigger: decks whose commander draws/tempts off putting +1/+1 counters on creatures (Galadriel) have their primary engine fully missed
The Ring / Ring-bearer mechanic is entirely absent from the taxonomy despite being a major LOTR-set theme
rampâ†’sink is over-weighted and over-connected: pairing every mana source with every X-spell/big-spell produces 56 edges of near-zero real synergy and props up the cohesion/largestWebShare numbers
No landfallâ†’payoff family despite landfall being a tagged 'produces' event on 5 cards
'attach' family is too loose â€” it links auras, equipment, and curses indiscriminately with no regard to whether the attachment helps or hurts or interacts
'leaves' and generic 'destroy' families generate incidental edges between cards that share a keyword but have no functional relationship
Evasion/protection equipment â†’ commander-damage payoff is not modeled, so a counters-voltron win line reads as island-ish utility

rawEvals.name: Scrappy Survivors (Fallout Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Naya (RGW) Equipment-matters / aura-Voltron deck with a Junk-token aristocrats subtheme. Dogmeat, Ever Loyal makes a Junk token (and reanimates from it) whenever an Aura or Equipment enters; the deck is stuffed with cheap Equipment (Bloodforged Battle-Axe, Brass Knuckles, Fireshrieker, Behemoth Sledge, Junk Jet, Silver Shroud Costume, Pre-War Formalwear) and Auras (Rancor, All That Glitters, Idolized, Sticky Fingers, Mantle of the Ancients), plus equipment-cast payoffs (Puresteel Paladin, Armory Paladin, Sticky Fingers, Moira Brown). It wins by suiting up a creature (often the commander) into a wide/tall Voltron threat with trample/double-strike, grinding value off equip/attach triggers and Junk tokens, with a light treasure/ramp shell.
fp: All That Glitters â‡„ Basilisk Collar (and the whole 206-edge 'attach' clique among Equipment/Auras) â€” two Equipment or two Auras do not interact by sharing the 'attach' tag; you can't equip a sword to a sword. These are co-occurrence, not synergy.
Heroic Intervention â‡„ Valorous Stance ['destroy'] â€” both being noncreature spells that say 'destroy' is not a synergy; they don't combo or enable each other.

Arcane Signet â‡„ Idolized / Sol Ring â‡„ Mister Gutsy ['rampâ†’sink'] â€” generic 'I have mana, you spend mana' is the weakest possible link and is being counted as deck cohesion when it's just normal ramp-into-spells.

Bloodforged Battle-Axe â‡„ Three Dog ['copyâ†’trigger'] flagged at strength 2, but Three Dog copies tokens/triggers, not the Axe's combat-damage copy of itself â€” the copyâ†’trigger pairing here conflates unrelated 'copy' capabilities.
fn: Dogmeat, Ever Loyal's core trigger: 'whenever an Aura or Equipment you control enters, create a Junk token' â€” the central engine of the deck. No 'aura/equipment ETB â†’ token' event exists, so ~25 attach-cards feeding the commander are not modeled as synergy at all.

Equipment-cast / cast-an-Equipment payoffs: Puresteel Paladin (draw on equipment cast + free equip with metalcraft) and Armory Paladin/Sticky Fingers as equipment-density payoffs â€” the 'cast an Equipment â†’ reward' family is missing; Puresteel ends up an effective island (deg 1).
Voltron 'commander damage / single big threat' as a win condition is unrepresented â€” combatâ†’payoff treats it as generic go-wide, missing that auras/equipment stack onto one body for lethal.
Living-weapon / equip-and-reanimate loop: Pre-War Formalwear and Mantle of the Ancients reattaching from the graveyard with Dogmeat's reanimation isn't captured as a recursion engine.
issues: No event for the most common Fallout/Equipment-matters trigger: 'an Aura or Equipment ETB'. This is a taxonomy gap that hollows out the cohesion score for any equipment-tokens deck.

The 'attach' family is over-weighted and mis-applied: it generates a near-complete clique among all Equipment+Auras (206 edges) regardless of whether they can actually be attached to each other, inflating avgDeg/largestWebShare while the real synergy density is lower.
Missing a 'cast-an-Equipment/Aura â†’ payoff' enablement family, leaving equipment payoffs (Puresteel Paladin) as islands.
rampâ†’sink fires on generic mana producers vs generic mana sinks, adding low-signal edges that pad cohesion.

hasCombo=false is correct, but the score is suppressed mainly because the true engine is untracked rather than because the deck is incoherent â€” the model's cohesion is measuring the wrong thing here.

rawEvals.name: Angels: They're Just Like Us, but Cooler and with Wings (Secret Lair Commander 2023 Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Mono-white Angel tribal lifegain midrange
fp: Lifegain transitive sources: Search for Glory â‡„ Cosmos Elixir, Mazemind Tome â‡„ Well of Lost Dreams, Cosmos Elixir â‡„ Well of Lost Dreams â€” two cards that both gain life is not an interaction; gaining life from one does nothing for the other

Kindred Boon â‡„ Cleansing Nova / Dismantling Wave / Austere Command / Sunblast Angel (destroy family) â€” Kindred Boon's totem armor protects an Angel through a wipe but is not a 'destroy synergy'; flagging it against the deck's own boardwipes implies a payoff loop that doesn't exist

Ajani, Strength of the Pride â‡„ nearly every body via tribal-countâ†’payoff (deg 39) â€” Ajani's relevant ability counts creatures for one big lifegain/-emblem, but edging it individually to all ~30 creatures massively over-states a single static count and dominates the web
Sephara, Sky's Blade â‡„ Cleansing Nova/Dismantling Wave/Austere Command (destroy) â€” Sephara doesn't combo with mass destruction; this is the same over-eager destroy pairing
fn: Reanimation/recursion engine: Bruna, the Fading Light (return an Angel/Human from GY on ETB), Breathkeeper Seraph, Emeria Shepherd (landfall recursion), Dawnbreak Reclaimer, Angel of Serenity â€” these produce/consume 'graveyard'/'reanimate' but generated almost no edges (Bruna deg 2); the recur-fat-Angels subtheme is a real engine the taxonomy missed

Tribal cast/cost payoffs left as islands: Urza's Incubator and Pearl Medallion (cost reduction â†’ cast more Angels) and Vanquisher's Banner (tribal cast â†’ draw) are core tribal-deck engines but have no link from cost-reducer/cast to the tribe

Heirloom Blade (island) â€” replaces a dying creature with a same-type creature from library; in a 30-Angel deck this is a recurring card-advantage engine tied directly to the tribal density, completely missed (attach capability has no tribe payoff)

Bishop of Wings as an ETB-Angel lifegain/token engine is only partially captured via lifegain; its 'whenever an Angel ETBs gain 4 / on death make a token' is a discrete tribal-ETB trigger with no dedicated family
issues: lifegain family is non-directional/transitive and uncapped â€” sources get edged to sources, ballooning to 73 instances and dominating cohesion without representing real engines

tribal-countâ†’payoff and lordâ†’tribe create N-to-1 stars (Ajani, Righteous Valkyrie) that inflate avgDeg/largestWebShare; a single static 'counts creatures' card should not generate one strong edge per creature
no reanimation/recursion family despite 'graveyard'/'reanimate' produce/consume tags existing on cards â€” the events are tracked but never turned into edges

no attachâ†’tribe or cast-triggerâ†’tribe enablement family, so Heirloom Blade, Vanquisher's Banner, Urza's Incubator, Pearl Medallion, Commander's Plate fall into islands in an otherwise tight tribal deck
destroy family is too loose â€” it pairs protection (Kindred Boon) and indestructible-granters (Sephara) with the deck's own boardwipes as if synergistic

rawEvals.name: Hail, Caesar (Fallout Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Mardu (WBR) go-wide tokens / aristocrats midrange. Caesar makes 1/1 Soldier tokens whenever you attack with three or more creatures, and lets you sacrifice tokens for card draw and direct damage. The deck floods the board with token-makers (Secure the Wastes, Martial Coup, Captain of the Watch, Assemble the Legion, etc.), buffs them with anthems/overruns (Intangible Virtue, Heroic Reinforcements, Fervent Charge, lord effects), and wins either by an attack-step alpha strike or by sacrificing the wide board into aristocrat drains (Bastion of Remembrance) and card draw (Skullclamp, Deadly Dispute). Sub-theme: treasure/sac value (Pitiless Plunderer, Mr. House) feeding mana sinks.
fp: The 126 rampâ†’sink edges (e.g. Sol Ring â‡„ Martial Coup, Arcane Signet â‡„ Secure the Wastes, all three Talismans â‡„ every X-spell) are generic 'mana rock + X-spell' pairings, not a deck-specific engine â€” they inflate edge count without representing real synergy

Hour of Reckoning tagged with is-ramp/is-mana-sink and wired into the rampâ†’sink web â€” it is a board wipe (convoke-cost token wrath), not a mana sink; this is a capability mislabel producing fake edges
Lethal Scheme â‡„ ramp rocks via rampâ†’sink â€” Lethal Scheme is convoke removal, not a mana-sink payoff for ramp; the convoke 'is-mana-sink' tag manufactures spurious ramp edges

Powder Ganger â‡„ General's Enforcer 'destroy' and the many General's Enforcer â‡„ wipe 'destroy' edges conflate 'this card can destroy' with 'these two cards synergize' â€” they share no real interaction
Mr. House diceCoin/diceCoin self-loop capability contributes nothing yet House is wired broadly; its dice-rolling sub-theme is not actually supported by other cards
fn: Skullclamp is an island (deg 0) but is the deck's strongest engine: equip to a 1/1 token, it dies, draw two â€” a token-machine + sac-draw loop. The taxonomy has no 'equip/attach â†’ death â†’ draw' or 'toughness-1 â†’ Skullclamp' family, so the single best synergy card is invisible

Caesar's own activated ability (sacrifice a token: draw a card / deal damage) is a sac outlet and a token-drain payoff, but Caesar is only ever tagged as a token PRODUCER â€” the classifier never connects Caesar as a sacrifice OUTLET to all the token fodder, missing the commander's core engine
Mr. House and Sierra/Vault 11 dice-roll & Nuka-Cola token synergies (a real Fallout sub-theme) have no family

Convoke as a token-sink (Secure the Wastes, Martial Coup, Hour of Reckoning, Lethal Scheme can be paid by tapping the token army) is a genuine wide-board payoff but is modeled â€” wrongly â€” as rampâ†’sink rather than a tokensâ†’convoke-cost relationship
issues: No equipment/attach-death-draw family: Skullclamp, an auto-include token engine, scores zero and lands in islandCards â€” a glaring taxonomy gap for go-wide decks

Commander's sacrifice-for-value activated ability is not modeled as a sac OUTLET; cards are typed only as producers/consumers from a fixed event list, so Caesar can't be both token-maker and token-eater

rampâ†’sink family is massively over-weighted (126 instances, the single largest family) by pairing every mana source with every X/convoke spell â€” generic ramp is treated as synergy and dominates cohesion inputs without reflecting real deck cohesion
convoke is mis-mapped to is-mana-sink/is-ramp, mislabeling Hour of Reckoning (a wrath) and Lethal Scheme (removal) and generating spurious rampâ†’sink edges

Cohesion 45 / 'Loosely connected' under-rates a focused linear precon: 94% interactive, one 94%-share web, clear tokens+aristocrats+lords backbone â€” the score is dragged down despite a genuinely cohesive game plan, suggesting the metric penalizes a tightly-themed deck or that noisy ramp edges dilute the weighted average

rawEvals.name: Eternal Might (Aetherdrift Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Esper (WUB) Zombie/Eternal tokens-matter midrange precon led by Temmet, Naktamun's Will. It grinds value via embalm/eternalize and reanimation (Champion of Wits, Timeless Dragon, God-Pharaoh's Gift, The Scarab God, Rot Hulk, Hashaton, Liliana), goes wide with Zombie/Eternal tokens (Grave Titan, Dread Summons, Maskwood Nexus, Eternal Skylord, Gleaming Overseer), and closes via Temmet's combat token-copy trigger plus a light aristocrats drain package (Plague Belcher, Undead Augur, Wayward Servant, Corpse Knight). Tribal payoffs/lords (Cemetery Reaper, Lord of the Accursed, Zombie Master, Prophet of the Scarab) glue it together. No combo; it wins by board presence and incremental drain.
fp: copyâ†’trigger over-application: Renewed Solidarity â‡„ Grave Titan / Fleshbag Marauder / Champion of Wits etc. â€” copying a creature's ETB is generic value, not a tuned synergy line, yet 76 such edges dominate the graph

Angel of Sanctions / Cast Out â‡„ Champion of Wits / Timeless Dragon (copyâ†’trigger) â€” these are O-ring exile enchantments and unrelated embalm creatures; flagging them as a copy-trigger pair is spurious
Temmet â‡„ Commander's Sphere (draw) and Temmet â‡„ Cast Out (draw) â€” generic card-draw co-occurrence, not an intentional synergy with the commander
Bontu's Monument â‡„ Gravecrawler / Dusk // Dawn (cast) â€” cost reduction on a few black spells is incidental, not a built-around engine
Fleshbag Marauder â‡„ Crowded Crypt (sacrifice) and Dusk//Dawn â‡„ Crowded Crypt (sacrifice) â€” these are not a sac-fodder/outlet line; Crowded Crypt sacs itself, unrelated to Fleshbag's edict
fn: Temmet's attack-triggered token-copy ability (the commander's whole gameplan) is not modeled as its own event â€” it is collapsed into generic combatâ†’payoff, so the deck's actual win engine is invisible

Embalm / Eternalize as a graveyard-recursion mechanic has no event: Champion of Wits, Timeless Dragon, Angel of Sanctions, Vizier of Many Faces, Twisted Abomination's recursion value is only partially captured via the broad graveyard family

+1/+1 counters / Amass theme (Eternal Skylord, Gleaming Overseer, Lazotep Chancellor, Dreadhorde Invasion, Commence the Endgame, Crowded Crypt, Priest of the Crossing all have-counters) has no counters-matters family â€” the Amass/proliferate-adjacent subtheme is missed
Maskwood Nexus changeling-effect (all creatures become every type) massively amplifies Zombie tribal/lords â€” its true role as a tribal enabler is not represented (deg only 4)
God-Eternal Oketra's cast-trigger making 4/4 Zombie Warrior tokens off every creature cast is a token engine, captured only weakly via 'cast' family rather than as a creature-castâ†’token payoff
issues: copyâ†’trigger family has no gate distinguishing 'copies a permanent for ETB value' (generic) from a genuine copy-combo; here it produced 76 edges and became the largest family, distorting the graph toward a phantom copy theme
No counters-matters / Amass family despite 7+ cards with has-counters capability â€” proliferate/counter subthemes are systematically invisible
Commander's signature ability (Temmet's token-copy on attack) is flattened into combatâ†’payoff; commanders should get a bespoke event since they anchor the deck
Embalm/Eternalize/changeling (Maskwood Nexus) tribal-enabling mechanics are not modeled, undercounting Maskwood Nexus and embalm creatures
rampâ†’sink fires for every signet Ă— every X-spell/mana-sink pair (48 instances), inflating edge count with low-information generic ramp links

rawEvals.name: Corrupting Influence (Phyrexia All Will Be One Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Phyrexian poison/toxic-infect midrange built around proliferate. Toxic/infect creatures (Plague Stinger, Ichorclaw Myr, Blight Mamba, Phyrexian Swarmlord, Venomous Brutalizer, Ichor Rats, Bilious Skulldweller, Pestilent Syphoner, Grafted Exoskeleton) chip poison counters onto opponents, and proliferators (Evolution Sage, Grateful Apparition, Contagion Clasp, Blightbelly Rat, Norn's Choirmaster, Cankerbloom, Vat Emergence, etc.) multiply those poison counters toward the 10-poison kill while also growing the deck's own +1/+1 counters. Commander Ixhel rewards having poisoned a player by drawing/making Horror tokens off creatures with counters. A pillowfort shell (Ghostly Prison, Windborn Muse, Norn's Annex) buys time for the slow poison clock.
fp: Glistening Sphere â‡„ mana rocks / Phyrexian Atlas (proliferateâ†’counters): proliferate does nothing relevant to a tapped-for-mana rock with no growing counters â€” clique artifact, not a synergy

Glissa's Retriever â‡„ Sol Ring / Arcane Signet / Fellwar Stone / Golgari Signet / Chromatic Lantern (rampâ†’sink): generic ramp-to-X-cost edges, Retriever is not a meaningful payoff for these rocks in this deck
Scavenging Ooze â‡„ proliferators (proliferateâ†’counters): Ooze's counters come from eating the graveyard and proliferating them is incidental, not a built-around line
Wurmquake / Painful Truths â‡„ ramp rocks (rampâ†’sink): treated as a mana-sink payoff axis, but these are just X-spells/draw, not a cohesive ramp-sink engine

Vishgraz â‡„ Noxious Assault and Carrion Call â‡„ Noxious Assault flagged go-wideâ†’payoff strength 3: token bodies here are toxic-poison vehicles, not a go-wide overrun plan, so the family label misreads the intent
fn: No poison/toxic/infect â†’ poison-counter-win family at all: the deck's entire kill condition (toxic creatures + infect attacking opponents to 10 poison) is invisible; Plague Stinger, Ichorclaw Myr, Blight Mamba, Plague Myr, Phyrexian Swarmlord, Ichor Rats, Venomous Brutalizer are not connected to a win payoff

proliferateâ†’poison-on-opponents is conflated with proliferateâ†’+1/+1-on-own-board: these are two distinct payoff axes collapsed into one 'counters' bucket, hiding that proliferate is a wincon accelerator, not just a self-buff
Grafted Exoskeleton as an infect-enabler (turns any creature into a poison threat) is not modeled as an enablerâ†’payoff edge
Ixhel's own counters-matter payoff (draw / Phyrexian Horror tokens off creatures with counters, and its poison-trigger) is not represented as a payoff hub
Phyresis Outbreak's signature line (distribute poison, then proliferate it) is captured only as weak generic 'debuff', missing the poison-distribution â†’ proliferate combo
Pillowfort defensive subsystem (Ghostly Prison, Windborn Muse, Norn's Annex) that protects the slow poison clock is dumped into islandCards with zero recognition as a functional cluster
issues: Taxonomy has no poison/toxic/infect event or 'poison-counter win' family â€” a glaring gap for a set literally about Phyrexian infect

proliferateâ†’counters is modeled as a complete bipartite clique (every proliferator â‡„ every counter-bearer), inflating avgDeg (14.45) and edge count (470) and dominating familyBreakdown 411/470 â€” strength/weighting does not distinguish a real payoff from incidental counter presence
No distinction between 'counters on opponents' (poison, wincon) vs 'counters on my own permanents' (+1/+1, value) â€” the single 'has-counters' capability cannot express directionality
Defensive/stax pillowfort permanents (taxes, fog-fences) have no family and fall to islands, undercounting cohesion for control/attrition decks
Cohesion 57 lands roughly right by accident: the proliferate clique over-credits a true backbone while the missing poison-win and pillowfort families under-credit it, so two large errors offset

rawEvals.name: Turtle Power! (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Bant (GWU) +1/+1 counters midrange that goes both tall and wide. Leonardo, the Balance seeds counters and tokens; a counters-matters core (counter doublers Corpsejack Menace, Big Mother Mouser, Coin of Mastery, Level Up, Arcade Cabinet + counter sources like Steelbane/Voracious Hydra, Biogenic Ooze, Vigor and the named Turtles) builds a fat, wide board that wins via combat damage with attack-trigger payoffs (Shredder, Foot Chopper, Endless Foot Assault, Casey Jones, Bebop).
fp: Double Jump // Flying Kick â‡„ Corpsejack Menace / Big Mother Mouser (counter-multiplier) â€” a one-shot combat-trick pump does not meaningfully 'combo' with a counter doubler; flagged as strong (s3) but is incidental
Special Move â‡„ Coin of Mastery / Arcade Cabinet (counter-multiplier) â€” Special Move is removal, not a counters engine; doubling its incidental counter is irrelevant
~100 sac-fodderâ†’outlet edges (e.g. Donatello/Rocksteady/Irma/April â‡„ Arcade Cabinet/Rat King/Tempestra) â€” deck has no sacrifice payoff theme; these are not real synergies
Bebop, Skull & Crossbones â‡„ Sol Ring / Arcane Signet / Chromatic Lantern (rampâ†’sink) â€” generic 'ramp feeds a mana sink' noise, not a deck synergy
Shredder â‡„ Acidic Slime (copyâ†’trigger, s2) â€” copying a one-off Naturalize ETB is marginal, over-counted across many low-value ETBs
fn: Leonardo's balance/symmetry payoff and lifegain-on-counter ability â€” no event in the taxonomy captures the commander's actual draw/payoff loop
'Modified creatures matter' / equip-aura-counter payoffs (Foot Chopper attach, Together Forever) as a named family â€” only loosely captured via attach
Goad as a real (political) line â€” Fast Forward goads but is islanded with no goad payoff modeled, so the mechanic is invisible
Cultivate islanded â€” it is ramp/land-fixing and should feed rampâ†’sink like the mana rocks, so ramp detection is inconsistent
issues: counter-multiplier is over-weighted: doublers form a bipartite clique with every has-counters card, including one-shot pump/removal, dominating edge count (180) and degree
sac-fodderâ†’outlet fires on any creature + any sac-capable permanent with no gate requiring an actual death/aristocrat payoff, producing ~100 phantom edges
No 'counters-matters payoff' distinction between persistent counter generators (where doublers compound) and one-shot counter events (where they don't)
No goad payoff family, so political cards are silently islanded
Ramp detection inconsistent: mana rocks feed rampâ†’sink but a fetch-ramp spell (Cultivate) is left as an island

rawEvals.name: The Ruinous Powers (Warhammer 40,000 Commander Precon Decklist)
rawEvals.archetype: Grixis Chaos Daemon-tribal go-wide midrange built around Abaddon the Despoiler.
